    failTriggers <li>

  • Animal is not reachable.

    RitualPatternDef

    Text:

  • A dance party with drums. Participants will gather, socialize, play drums, and dance to have fun and connect with each other.
  • A dance party with loud music. Participants will gather, socialize, and dance to have fun and connect with each other.
  • A party around a Christmas tree. Participants will gather around a Christmas tree and make merry.
  • A ritualistic animal sacrifice. The organizer will give a speech to excite the crowd, then cut the animal's throat. Once the animal is dead, the organizer will speak some finishing words.
  • A ritualistic burning of a hated symbol. Participants will gather around a sacrificial structure, light it on fire, and celebrate as it burns to ash.
  • A ritualistic flesh-eating meal. Participants gather around a platter of human flesh and bloodily feast on it.
  • A ritualistic prisoner sacrifice. The organizer will give a speech to excite the crowd, then cut the prisoner's throat. Once the prisoner is dead, organizer will speak some finishing words.
  • A ritualistic smoking of large amounts of smokeleaf. Participants will gather around a burnbong or incense shrine, light it on fire, and celebrate while inhaling the fumes.
  • A social ritual where people release skylanterns. Participants will assemble wooden skylanterns while socializing, then release them and watch them drift away.

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\PreceptDefs\RitualPatternDefs\RitualPatterns.xml

    • description

    Parents:

    AbilityDef, comps <li>, comps <li Class="CompProperties_BiosculpterPod_AgeReversalCycle">, comps <li Class="CompProperties_BiosculpterPod_HealingCycle">, comps <li Class="CompProperties_BiosculpterPod_PleasureCycle">, FactionDef, GauranlenTreeModeDef, HediffDef, IdeoPresetCategoryDef, IdeoPresetDef, MainButtonDef, MemeDef, outcomeChances <li>, PreceptDef, PrisonerInteractionModeDef, ResearchProjectDef, RitualOutcomeEffectDef, SitePartDef, SlaveInteractionModeDef, SpecialThingFilterDef, spectatorFilter, stages <li>, StatDef, TerrainDef, TerrainTemplateDef, ThingDef, WorldObjectDef

    Text:

  • {0}s must have {ROLE_labelIndef}!
  • {GENDER} members will be pleased when wearing {APPAREL_indefinite}. {GENDER} members will arrive wearing {APPAREL_indefinite} if it doesn't interfere with any other apparel.
  • {GENDER} members will be pleased when wearing {APPAREL_indefinite}. {GENDER} members will arrive wearing {APPAREL_indefinite} unless it interferes with armor.
  • {RELICNAME} was present during our ritual.
  • A barrel from a long-range cannon for artillery or anti-ship use. When it was new, it must have been frighteningly powerful. Now, it's far beyond repair and every useful component has been looted.
  • A bedside device that accelerates the sleeper's circadian rhythm. This speeds up sleep, but consumes a lot of electricity and also causes increased hunger. It must be placed directly adjacent to and facing the head of the bed. Placing more than one sleep accelerator near the same bed has no effect.
  • A blindfold is blocking this person's vision.
  • A building of ideoligious significance. Believers sit or kneel on this while watching rituals.
  • A building of ideoligious significance. Only those who follow this ideoligion can build it. It may be used as a focus for rituals.
  • A bunch of rusted old pipes. It is hard to say how these ended up here.
  • A celebratory gathering for your colonists to have fun. A leader will give an encouraging speech, then everyone will socialize for a while.
  • A celebratory tree decorated with ornaments and lights traditionally made as part of Christmas celebrations.
  • A ceremonial building that protects and displays a relic. Relics are ancient objects venerated by some cultures, belief systems, or religions.
  • A ceremony for changing social roles. The person changing roles will give a speech while others gather around. The required number of spectators must attend.
  • A collection of ancient equipment blocks of unknown function. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
  • A collection of packed incense containers. It can be ignited and produce a powerful incense effect as a focus for rituals. It is destroyed after it burns down.
  • A colonist died because someone took body parts from them. It's horrible.
  • A colonist died in our ripscanner, their brain burned to ash to feed the machine. It's horrifying.
  • A colonist was euthanized. It was humane, but still sad.
  • A colonist was killed in cold blood. It seemed a bit evil.
  • A community of ranchers who hunt and raise animals for food. They don't like eating plants. They welcome diverse ideas.\n\nUnlocks the animals specialist role.
  • A conical woven hat. Good for keeping cool during long hours in the sun.
  • A connector will connect with a Gauranlen tree. The connector will touch the Gauranlen tree and speak to it, forming a permanent link. Others gather in a circle to watch and add force to the ritual.
  • A crown-like headpiece with stubby inward-facing spikes that poke the head. It is used to induce pain in the wearer.
  • A crown-like headpiece with stubby spikes that poke the head uncomfortably. It is used to put the wearer in pain.
  • A cutter will ritualistically blind a target. The audience will watch as the cutter gives a speech, cuts out both of the target's eyes, and says some closing words. The target will be left bleeding and need immediate medical care.
  • A decorative light that rotates and changes colors. Used as a focus for dance parties.
  • A drink with a smoke is fine, especially with friends, but poisoning the body with powerful chemicals is wrong.
  • A dryad caste specialized in absorbing hits during combat. Barkskin dryads are covered by a thick bark-like hide which is partly formed by the Gauranlen tree itself. Under human influence, it can act as a damage-absorbing fighter.\n\nIn general, dryads are mammal-like creatures that have a symbiotic relationship with the Gauranlen tree. They reproduce together with their tree, which contains a hidden dryad queen. Dryads can morph into various specialized castes.
  • A dryad caste specialized in absorbing hits during combat. Barkskin dryads are covered by a thick bark-like hide which is partly formed by the Gauranlen tree itself. Under human influence, it can act as a damage-absorbing fighter.
  • A dryad caste specialized in aggression and damage-dealing attacks. The clawer dryad is named for its massive claws. Though it can do tremendous damage, it is vulnerable to attacks itself.
  • A dryad caste specialized in carrying items. Under human influence, it can help haul things where they need to go.\n\nIn general, dryads are mammal-like creatures that have a symbiotic relationship with the Gauranlen tree. They reproduce together with their tree, which contains a hidden dryad queen. Dryads can morph into various specialized castes.
  • A dryad caste specialized in carrying items. Under human influence, it can help haul things where they need to go.
  • A dryad caste specialized in food production. Together with its Gauranlen tree, this dryad can generate nourishing berries on an ongoing basis. However, it is slow and ineffective at work or combat.\n\nIn general, dryads are mammal-like creatures that have a symbiotic relationship with the Gauranlen tree. They reproduce together with their tree, which contains a hidden dryad queen. Dryads can morph into various specialized castes.
  • A dryad caste specialized in food production. Together with its Gauranlen tree, this dryad can generate nourishing berries on an ongoing basis. However, it is slow and ineffective at work or combat.
  • A dryad caste specialized in medicine production. Together with its Gauranlen tree, this dryad can generate medicinal herbs on an ongoing basis. However, it is slow and ineffective at work or combat.\n\nIn general, dryads are mammal-like creatures that have a symbiotic relationship with the Gauranlen tree. They reproduce together with their tree, which contains a hidden dryad queen. Dryads can morph into various specialized castes.
  • A dryad caste specialized in medicine production. Together with its Gauranlen tree, this dryad can generate medicinal herbs on an ongoing basis. However, it is slow and ineffective at work or combat.
  • A dryad caste with huge claws that is specialized in aggression and damage-dealing attacks. Though it can do tremendous damage, it is vulnerable to attacks itself.\n\nIn general, dryads are mammal-like creatures that have a symbiotic relationship with the Gauranlen tree. They reproduce together with their tree, which contains a hidden dryad queen. Dryads can morph into various specialized castes.
  • A dryad caste with the unique ability to produce new Gauranlen pods and reproduce the Gauranlen tree along with its symbiote, the dryad queen. To do this, three gaumaker dryads must slowly merge.\n\nIn general, dryads are mammal-like creatures that have a symbiotic relationship with the Gauranlen tree. They reproduce together with their tree, which contains a hidden dryad queen. Dryads can morph into various specialized castes.
  • A dryad caste with the unique ability to produce new Gauranlen pods and reproduce the Gauranlen tree along with its symbiote, the dryad queen. To do this, three gaumaker dryads must slowly merge.
  • A duel between prisoners or slaves. The organizer will give a speech to excite the crowd, then the duelists will fight until one of them falls or time runs out. If weapons are in the arena, the duelists will pick up and use them.
  • A flag representing enemies, ready to be burned as part of a ritual.
  • A gathering that occurs around a believer's grave after they die and are buried. If the body is destroyed, an empty grave can be used. Slaves don't get funerals.
  • A giant wheel which came off some large vehicle many ages ago. The rubber has disintegrated away and the metal is twisted and rusted.
  • A grand archotech structure of towering height and impressive bulk. The shape is hard to perceive, and the surfaces seem to flow when stared at too long. It could have appeared moments ago, or been here thousands of years.\n\nIt emanates intense psychic influence, forcing thoughts and perceptions directly into the mind of anyone who ventures too close. The emanations are not aggressive, but they are utterly alien and impossible to ignore. Sensations unlinked from time or space, the endless rumination of an inhuman mind a billion times larger - the weak-minded lose themselves quickly under. Only the psychically-deaf are immune.
  • A grand platform that plays a role in ideoligious rituals.
  • A group of beggars seeking charity.
  • A group of pilgrims seeking to venerate an ancient relic.
  • A guilty colonist was executed. It was justified, but still sad.
  • A guilty prisoner or guest was executed. It was justified, but still sad.
  • A hard cap that partly covers the wearer's scalp.
  • A hard facial mask that resembles a stylized face.
  • A hat with a stiff brim and peaked top. It's not particularly protective, but it creates a sense of authority and makes the wearer more effective in suppressing slaves.
  • A homey rug with a rustic-style pattern, for decorating a floor.
  • A human skull.
  • A large ancient machine case filled with unknown machinery. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
  • A large archotech structure. The dull green surface is utterly pristine and undamaged, and so smooth that it's slippery. There is no way to guess how long it has been here, and its purpose seems unfathomable.\n\nThe psychic power it emanates isn't aggressive, but it is overwhelming and inhuman. Like standing inside a threshing machine of whirling blades, inside the heartbeat of a sleeping giant, inside a tight tunnel and you can't move or speak or breathe... Anyone who goes near it will become unsettled unless they are psychically deaf.
  • A large container from some ancient freight carrying vehicle. It has long since been looted and deteriorated into uselessness.
  • A large crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
  • A large garment that conceals the wearer's entire head and body.
  • A large image drawn on the ground and reinforced with metal edges. It is used as a focus for rituals.
  • A large loudspeaker for playing music. At least one is necessary to hold a dance party, and more loudspeakers will enhance the effect.
  • A large platform that plays a role in ideoligious rituals.
  • A large self-powered hermetically-sealed crate with built-in security alarms. These can preserve their contents for a long time. If it is opened without the proper code, it will probably activate some nearby security system.
  • A large wooden drum used as a music source for tribal rituals and parties.
  • A large, ancient engine block from some giant vehicle or power source. It's rusted through, and all the useful components are gone. No repair could salvage this.
  • A large, distinctive-looking tree with a unique life-cycle. Each Gauranlen tree contains a small non-conscious dryad queen. The queen births creatures called dryads which guard and tend the tree. In exchange, the tree nurtures its protectors by feeding them directly. From the outside, it appears the dryads are created by the tree directly and act as part of it.\n\nIt is possible for a person to form a connection with a Gauranlen tree and partially control the dryads it produces.\n\nSome say Gauranlen trees are the homes of nature spirits that follow humanity across worlds.
  • A large, thick cap, similar to a tuque. It has extra fabric along the back.
  • A leader who holds the group together and represents your faction in diplomatic interactions.
  • A long bench where ritual participants can sit while listening to a speaker. Place it facing rituals and speeches to extend the duration of their positive effects.
  • A long strip of cloth that is wrapped over the eyes to block vision.
  • A long, empty crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
  • A long, flowing robe without a hood.
  • A loose confederation of pirate groups who've agreed to mostly fight outsiders instead of fighting each other.\n\nPirates don't sow, they don't build, and they rarely trade. Driven by a blood-and-honor culture that values personal strength and ruthlessness, they enrich themselves by raiding and robbing their more productive neighbors.\n\nTheir technology level depends mostly on who they've managed to steal from recently. Mostly they carry gunpowder weapons, though some prefer to stab victims at close range.\n\nThis particular gang of pirates are cannibals.
  • A man may display or cover any part of his body.
  • A massive foot from an ancient warwalker. It seems to have been torn free from its owner by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
  • A meaty bioengineered mushroom grown for its nutritious value. It can grow on fungal gravel, but only in darkness - exposing it to any kind of light, including darklights, will kill it.
  • A medium platform that plays a role in ideoligious rituals.
  • A metal cage for holding and displaying corpses. This horrifying sight inspires terror and disgust in observers. It is an especially brutal and effective way to terrorize slaves.
  • A moderately-sized archotech tower rising from the ground. Traces along its surface glow steadily with a strange color. Humans can only begin to guess at its purpose.
  • A moral/spiritual leader who heads rituals and personally counsels believers.
  • A mounting platform that once held some sort of cannon. It has been broken for many years and every useful component was looted long ago.
  • A multiplier on a warden's ability to suppress slaves.
  • A multiplier on how fast this person can prune a Gauranlen tree to maintain their connection with it.\n\nPruning is more of a contemplative psychic task than a physical one, so health factors like vision are unimportant here.
  • A multiplier on how much certainty this person loses when someone else tries to convert them away from their ideoligion.
  • A multiplier on how quickly this person will complete a biosculpter pod cycle.
  • A multiplier on the chance that this person will try to convert other people to their own ideoligion.
  • A multiplier on the speed of a biosculpter pod. This is affected by the cleanliness of the room - a cleaner room will result in a quicker biosculpting cycle.
  • A neuron-sensitizing device that can deliver one neural supercharge each day. A person with a neural supercharge will think and learn faster, but will also consume more food. The effect wears off in one day. Neural superchargers consume a lot of electricity.
  • A new role will be assigned to a colonist.
  • A person-sized piece of material sculpted into a threatening form. Slaves who spend time around it will feel terror, which makes them stay suppressed for longer and thus reduces slave rebellions.
  • A piece of ancient razor wire. It has been deteriorating for many years and no longer poses any danger.
  • A pillow on which believers kneel while observing rituals, praying, or discussing.
  • A prisoner died in our ripscanner, their brain burned to ash to feed the machine. It's horrifying.
  • A prisoner or guest died because the colony took body parts from them. It's horrible.
  • A prisoner or guest was euthanized. It was humane, but still sad.
  • A prisoner or guest was killed in cold blood. It seemed a bit evil.
  • A radial arrangement of metal pieces in a spikecore style, for decorating a floor.
  • A relic of ideoligious significance.
  • A ritualistic scarring where a cutter carves ideoligious symbols into a target. The audience will watch as the cutter gives a speech, performs the cutting, then says some finishing words.
  • A rough wooden frame in the shape of a human, ready to be burned as part of a ritual.
  • A rousing speech intended to improve morale. Colonists will gather, and the leader will speak for a few hours. If all goes well, listeners will feel inspired, and gain respect for the leader. If it goes poorly, the speech will do social damage.
  • A section from an ancient pipeline. It once carried some valuable fluid over long distances. Now it's been looted and deteriorated to uselessness.
  • A self-powered hermetically-sealed crate for preserving valuable items. These can preserve their contents for a long time.
  • A sheet on which believers kneel while observing rituals, praying, or discussing.
  • A skull on a spike symbolizes our superiority.
  • A slab of hard material made to sleep on. Slab beds are uncomfortable, but some see their use as a demonstration of moral good. This one is wide enough to fit two people.
  • A slab of hard material made to sleep on. Slab beds are uncomfortable, but some see their use as a demonstration of moral good.
  • A slanted platform that holds a text in front of a speaker. Place it near the focus of rituals and speeches to extend the duration of their positive effects.
  • A slow, bumbling caste of dryad which specializes in wood production. Together with its Gauranlen tree, this dryad can generate a wood-like material on an ongoing basis. However, it is slow and ineffective at work or combat.\n\nIn general, dryads are mammal-like creatures that have a symbiotic relationship with the Gauranlen tree. They reproduce together with their tree, which contains a hidden dryad queen. Dryads can morph into various specialized castes.
  • A slow, bumbling caste of dryad which specializes in wood production. Together with its Gauranlen tree, this dryad can generate a wood-like material on an ongoing basis. However, it is slow and ineffective at work or combat.
  • A small platform that plays a role in ideoligious rituals.
  • A small pod that protects a single Gauranlen seed. This seed can be harvested and used to plant a Gauranlen tree.
  • A small tree, pruned and shaped to look visually pleasing.
  • A small, empty crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
  • A special ideoligious status focusing on animals to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role gives increased taming and training efficiency. Holders of this role will refuse to perform some non-animals-related tasks.
  • A special ideoligious status focusing on crafting and construction to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role gives increased crafting and construction efficiency, and the ability to boost the production abilities of nearby allies. Holders of this role will refuse to do some non-production work.
  • A special ideoligious status focusing on medicine to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role gives improved surgery and tending efficiency, and the ability to boost the medical abilities of nearby allies. Believers who receive care from one of this role will be happy about it. Holders of this role will refuse to do any kind of violence, and won't perform some non-medical tasks.
  • A special ideoligious status focusing on melee combat to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role gives increased dodge and hit chance in melee combat and the ability to enter a short-term berserk trance. Holders of this role will refuse to do many kinds of non-melee-related work.
  • A special ideoligious status focusing on mining to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role gives increased mining speed, and the ability to boost the mining speed of nearby allies. Holders of this role will refuse to do some non-mining work.
  • A special ideoligious status focusing on planting to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role gives increased sowing and harvesting efficiency, and the ability to boost the farming speed of nearby allies. Holders of this role will refuse to perform some non-plants-related work.
  • A special ideoligious status focusing on ranged combat to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role gives increased accuracy and the ability to boost the shooting abilities of nearby allies. Holders of this role will refuse to do many kinds of non-shooting-related work.
  • A special ideoligious status focusing on research to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role gives increased research and hacking speed, and the ability to boost research abilities of nearby allies. Holders of this role will refuse to perform some non-research tasks.
  • A specially-treated fungus torch that produces a dim light over a large area. People who prefer darklight work best with this light source. Can be automatically refueled with raw fungus. Produces a small amount of heat.
  • A specially-treated wooden torch that produces a dim light over a large area. People who prefer darklight work best with this light source. Can be automatically refueled with wood. Produces a small amount of heat.
  • A sphere of fibrous plant matter. A dryad inside is slowly healing its wounds.
  • A sphere of fibrous plant matter. A dryad inside is slowly morphing into a new form. Gauranlen trees grow these spheres to help protect the dryads as they morph.
  • A spike mounted upright for the purpose of piercing and displaying a human skull. To some, displayed skulls are a symbol of power. To others, they represent barbaric evil. Skullspikes are an especially brutal and effective way to terrorize slaves.
  • A spot for carrying out certain kinds of rituals.
  • A spreadable form of gravel for growing fungal crops underground. It must be placed under overhead mountain so the dank coolness of the depths can nourish the fungal spores.
  • A stone bas relief of morbid imagery for decorating a floor.
  • A stump left behind after a garuanlen tree has been felled. The stump can be extracted but yields very little usable wood. Left outdoors, the stump will deteriorate in time.
  • A table once used for surgical operations. It has long since deteriorated into uselessness.
  • A table with a mirror and styling tools. People can use this to change their look.
  • A tall brown mushroom with a long stem. When harvested, it yields a wood-like substance.
  • A tame {ANIMALKIND} passed away. The death of such a noble beast is cause for sadness.
  • A thick cap made from animal skin with a stylish bushy tail. Great for keeping warm in winter.
  • A trial over some heinous accusation. The initiator will accuse someone of terrible wrongdoing and gather people for a trial. Spectators will listen as the accuser and accused argue back and forth, then decide if the accusation is true. If the accused is convicted, you can freely banish, arrest or execute them and nobody will mind. The chance of a conviction depends on the social abilites of the accused and accuser, and the number of spectators.
  • A village containing an ancient terminal which the locals worship.
  • A warden will execute this slave on the spot by cutting.
  • A warden will free this slave.
  • A warden will imprison this slave. Once imprisoned, they can be recruited, or enslaved once again.
  • A woman may display or cover any part of her body.
  • A wood structure packed with smokeleaf. It can be ignited during a ritual and produce a huge amount of smokeleaf smoke for a few hours, after which it is destroyed.
  • A wooden bas relief of animalist imagery for decorating a floor.
  • A wooden bas relief of totemic imagery for decorating a floor.
  • A wooden tower for ritual burning.
  • A work site built by another faction. It will expire in time. Until then, you can raid it if you wish.
  • A wrapped piece of fabric which covers the wearer's hair.
  • Administer drug
  • Administer hard drug
  • Administer recreational drug
  • Admitting our corrupt, sinful nature is as crucial as suffering for it. Pain and sacrifices are approved, while physical love and comfort are shameful.
  • Aging and death have no hold on me. I am forever, as an enhanced human ought to be.
  • All biosculpting cycles take half the usual time.
  • All colonists have same ideoligion
  • Allow food that contains insect meat. This accounts for meals whose classification depends on their ingredients.
  • Allow food that is acceptable to cannibals (i.e. it contains human meat). This accounts for meals whose classification depends on their ingredients.
  • Allow food that is acceptable to vegetarians but unacceptable to those that only eat meat. This accounts for meals whose classification depends on their ingredients.
  • Allow food that is generally acceptable to meat eaters but unacceptable to vegetarians. This accounts for meals whose classification depends on their ingredients. This does not control human and insect meat.
  • Allow the dead bodies of slaves.
  • Allowing a machine to decide to kill is a terrible thing.
  • Allowing a machine to decide to kill is an absolutely inhuman thing to do.
  • Allowing a machine to decide to kill is an ugly thing.
  • Almost all others here have different beliefs. I'm so proud to be part of such a community.
  • Almost all others here have different beliefs. It's a sign of a healthy community.
  • Almost all others here have different beliefs. It's an important sign of a healthy community.
  • An ancient air conditioning machine. Its internals were smashed long ago and what wasn't looted has rusted away in the time since.
  • An ancient archotech device. Some say it is capable of invoking the power of the machine god.
  • An ancient ATM. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
  • An ancient complex containing treasure.
  • An ancient complex housing a relic.
  • An ancient computer interface. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
  • An ancient computer terminal. It can be hacked to call nearby enemies.
  • An ancient computer terminal. It can be hacked to reveal long-forgotten information.
  • An ancient console with an attached communications dish. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
  • An ancient device for heating food. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
  • An ancient device that looks like it once stored some kind of fluid. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
  • An ancient device used for washing textiles. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
  • An ancient dropship engine. It probably came off a military troop carrier. Its delicate internals are rusted to uselessness, and the valuable parts were looted long ago.
  • An ancient electrical generator. Its usable parts were smashed or looted long ago, and the rest has rusted into uselessness.
  • An ancient engine block that is rusted through. No repair could salvage this.
  • An ancient fence made of reinforced concrete posts joined by concrete panels.
  • An ancient hydrant. Heavily rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
  • An ancient jet engine, probably detached from a large airplane. Its delicate internals are rusted to uselessness, and the valuable parts were looted long ago.
  • An ancient kitchen sink made of some non-metallic fiber-sheet material. It is badly deteriorated and there's no way to salvage anything from it.\n\nHow it got here must be a long story.
  • An ancient oven. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
  • An ancient pod car once capable of automated flight. Its valuable parts were looted long ago, and the rest is badly deteriorated.
  • An ancient postbox, smashed and deteriorated to uselessness. It seems to have been moved here long ago for some unknown reason.
  • An ancient rack unit packed with unidentifiable devices. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
  • An ancient refrigerator. It was stripped of interesting parts long ago.
  • An ancient stove. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
  • An ancient toilet. Smashed long ago, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
  • An ancient ultratech spacedrone.
  • An ancient vending machine. It was smashed ages ago and generations of looters have taken every conceivably useful part. How it ended up here is a mystery.
  • An ancient wheel from some kind of vehicle. The rubber has deteriorated away and the metal is twisted and rusted.
  • An ancient, broken barrel that looks like it once contained waste of some sort. The only thing it contains now is a smear of dried sludge.
  • An ancient, broken car. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
  • An ancient, broken crate. Any valuables it once contained have degraded to uselessness.
  • An ancient, broken crate. Any valuables it once contained were taken long ago.
  • An ancient, broken security turret. The valuable parts have all been looted or smashed.
  • An ancient, broken ship navigation beacon. Every useful component was looted long ago.
  • An ancient, broken troop carrier. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
  • An ancient, broken truck. Everything useful either rusted away or was looted long ago.
  • An ancient, military-looking crate. It was broken long ago and any valuables it once contained were looted.
  • An ancient, rusted bank of lockers. All of the lockers have been forced open with nothing valuable left behind.
  • An ancient, rusted car frame. The body shell has long since rusted away to nothing.
  • An ancient, rusted shopping cart. How exactly it got here is a mystery, but the story is long and probably quite sad.
  • An ancient, unstable fuel node once used to charge machines with fuel. It has become unstable over the years due to lack of maintenance.
  • An area of floor covered with pre-chopped and arranged human meat ready for a cannibal feast.
  • An archotech structure that you can study.
  • An artistic scar carefully carved into the flesh for ritual or artistic purposes.
  • An automatic smokeleaf-burning device which generates a smoke cloud around itself. Anyone in the cloud will become high on smokeleaf over time.
  • An defensive fortification for stopping vehicles. It's been deteriorating for many years.
  • An executioner will publicly execute a prisoner. The executioner will give a short speech, execute the prisoner by cutting, and say some closing words. Spectating slaves will become afraid and intimidated, and colonists will feel exhilarated or disgusted depending on their beliefs.
  • An externally-induced increase in sensitivity and synchronicity of neurons. This boosts consciousness and learning rate at the cost of increased hunger.
  • An immersion pod full of bioactive gel. It can perform a variety of biological alterations including age reversal and pleasure-giving.\n\nThe pod biotunes to its user at the end of a cycle. While biotuned, it cannot be used by anyone else, but cycles will complete 25% more quickly. Biotuning resets if the pod is unused for 80 days.\n\nThe pod consumess 200W of power while working, but only 50W on standby.
  • An inedible, fibrous plant which produces a small amount of a wood-like substance.
  • An innocent animal was killed. I do not approve of this.
  • An innocent animal was killed. What a terrible, heartless act against another being.
  • An innocent, adorable animal was killed! That's murder!
  • An object with ideoligious significance.
  • An offset applied to the wearer's slave suppression. Higher values suppress slaves longer, while lower values make slaves rebel more often.
  • An offset on melee dodge chance if the target is indoors and lit.
  • An offset on melee dodge chance if the target is indoors in the dark.
  • An offset on melee dodge chance if the target is outdoors at night.
  • An offset on melee dodge chance if the target is outdoors during the day.
  • An offset on melee hit chance if the target is indoors and lit.
  • An offset on melee hit chance if the target is indoors in the dark.
  • An offset on melee hit chance if the target is outdoors at night.
  • An offset on melee hit chance if the target is outdoors during the day.
  • An offset on shooting accuracy if the target is indoors and lit.
  • An offset on shooting accuracy if the target is indoors in the dark.
  • An offset on shooting accuracy if the target is outdoors at night.
  • An offset on shooting accuracy if the target is outdoors during the day.
  • An old, rotted mattress on a rusty frame. Though uncomfortable, it can still be used, but it's too dilapidated to restore.
  • An uncomfortable arrangement of straps around the torso made for slaves. It reminds the wearer of their slave status and psychologically suppresses them, reducing the chance of a slave rebellion.
  • An uncomfortable collar made for slaves. It reminds the wearer of their slave status and psychologically suppresses them, reducing the chance of a slave rebellion.
  • Animals have rights as humans do.
  • Any harvesting, trading, or installing natural organs is an abhorrent evil.
  • Anyone who is a vegetarian is deeply morally deficient. Every meal should have some meat. Eggs, milk, and processed foods without vegetables are also fine.
  • Archotechs are the true gods. They know the moral structure of the universe, and serving them is how we will connect with it.
  • Attempt to convert someone to the speaker's ideoligion. This will reduce the target's certainty in their own beliefs. The certainty reduction depends on the speaker's negotiation ability.
  • Automated weapon in colony
  • Begin with a simple ideoligion and develop it over time.
  • Biosculpter pods violate the purity human flesh and should never be used.
  • Blinding people for ideoligious reasons is horrible.
  • Blindless opens the inner eye, and suffering illuminates the true sight.\n\nUnlocks the medical specialist role. Will have sacrifices, ritual blindings and scarifications. These people have reduced comfort expectations.
  • Blocking my vision gives my mind closer access to true reality. It's not as good as a permanent blinding, but it's acceptable.
  • Both partners keep their names upon marriage.
  • Bright light burns and destroys! Darkness nourishes and creates. People ought to live in darkness.
  • Build automated turret
  • By encouraging and commanding nearby allies, this person can enhance their focus in combat and thus their battle performance.
  • Call on a person to work harder for some time.
  • Call out shots and boost the shooting skills of everyone nearby. The effect remains attached to the caster for 24 hours.
  • Cannibal feasts are much better when both you and the meal are naked. It's almost like you can merge into one.\n\nIncludes sacrifices and gladiator duels.
  • Classic RimWorld without the ideoligion system. Good for your first few games, or when you're not trying to do something specific. All Ideology expansion content remains active.
  • Classic-like gameplay with small variations.
  • Clothing binds, controls, and suffocates us. We should all hang free.
  • Combat abilities are boosted thanks to being near someone who is using the combat command ability.
  • Construct biosculpter pods which can perform various biological alterations to colonists. These are especially important to believers in transhumanism.
  • Construct neural supercharger devices. Neural superchargers improve consciousness and learning rate, but they also increase hunger and the effect must be refreshed daily. Transhumanists often hold neural supercharging as an important practice.
  • Consuming human flesh is important. It should be in every meal.
  • Couples must share the man's name.
  • Couples must share the woman's name.
  • Couples randomly choose whether to share a name, and which name to share.
  • Create an aura that boosts the combat skills of everyone nearby. The effect lasts 24 hours and remains attached to the leader for the duration.
  • Customize a new ideoligion and control every detail. This can take a while.
  • Depending on ritual quality, participants will get between {MINMOOD} and {MAXMOOD} mood for {MOODDAYS} days.
  • Driven by fierce moral certainty and stories of ideoligious grievance, this person has driven him or herself into a rage. Every muscle is at peak performance, but it's hard to shut down the anger.
  • Drugs taken every {DAYSSATISIFED} days
  • Dryads are small mammalian creatures that have a symbiotic relationship with the Gauranlen tree. This immature dryad can support and protect its tree, but its main purpose is to morph into more specialized and powerful dryad forms.
  • Each person is a free individual with the right to their own ideas and decisions. Nobody should be made to conform.
  • Each person is part of a greater whole. People should work to play their part and help the group.
  • Each slave in colony
  • Eating human flesh is a deeply abhorrent and disgusting act.
  • Eating human flesh is a horrible thing to do.
  • Eating human flesh is an ugly thing to do.
  • Eating meat of any kind is a horrible act.
  • Eating meat of any kind is deeply evil.
  • Eating meat of any kind should be avoided.
  • Eating vegetarian food is awful. Every meal should have some meat. Eggs, milk, and processed foods without vegetables are also fine.
  • Eating vegetarian food is distasteful. Every meal should have some meat. Eggs, milk, and processed foods without vegetables are also fine.
  • Eclipses are a beautiful respite from the blinding sunlight.
  • Every part of me is somehow better at feeling good.
  • Every person ought to bear a ritual scar.
  • Every person ought to bear the ritual scars - all over.
  • Every person ought to bear the ritual scars - many of them.
  • Everyone must work hard and contribute to the community, so they can party in a smokeleaf circle together.\n\nUnlocks the plants specialist role.
  • Executed innocent prisoner
  • Executed prisoner
  • Executing a prisoner is a horrible thing under any circumstances.
  • Executing a prisoner is an abhorrent evil under any circumstances.
  • Executing an innocent prisoner is a horrible thing. If the prisoner is guilty, it's acceptable.
  • Executing prisoners is acceptable, whether they are guilty or innocent.
  • Executing prisoners is acceptable. If the prisoner is guilty, it is cause for great happiness.
  • Exotic states of mind are central to a good life.
  • Extreme temperatures don't bother us as much.
  • Extremely disruptive beliefs which make the game very different from classic RimWorld. These add significant difficulty.
  • Fine carpet decorated in a mind-bending style often associated with drug use.
  • Fine carpet in a morbid style.
  • Fine carpet with a hexagonal pattern for that ultra-technological look.
  • Fine steel plates decorated in an aggressive spikecore style.
  • Fine steel plates with a hexagonal pattern for that ultra-technological look.
  • Fine stone tiles in a morbid style.
  • Fine stone tiles in a spikecore style.
  • Fine stone tiles in a totemic style.
  • Fine wood boards decorated in a totemic style.
  • Five artificial enhancements! I'm beginning to feel perfect integration with my beliefs.
  • Following someone else's ideas and working all day are for weaklings. This group thrives on raiding others and contact with diverse ideas.\n\nUnlocks melee and shooting specialist roles. Will have gladiator duels.
  • Fungus is the right crop to eat. Crops of the light are poisoned by the air and sun.
  • Harvesting organs is a horrible thing. However, it's okay to buy, install, or sell them.
  • Harvesting organs is a horrible thing. Selling any natural organ is pretty bad too. However, it's okay to buy and install them.
  • Having a neural supercharge is the new standard. Without it, you're obsolete.
  • Heal all fresh wounds, blood loss, and one random infectious disease.
  • Heal all fresh wounds, heal one random permanent injury, and restore small missing body parts like fingers and toes.
  • Helping those in need is a good thing. It makes the community stronger.
  • How effective this person is at converting others to their own ideoligion. When this person attempts to convert someone else, this value multiplies the amount of certainty the other person loses.
  • How fast this person can hack into computer terminals.
  • How much this object contributes to overall style dominance in an area.
  • Human meat is just meat, like any other.
  • Human progress means merging with technology.
  • Humanleather apparel
  • Humans are the moral center of the universe.
  • Humans ought to live underground, and enjoy the succulent fruit of the depths.
  • Humans should strive to reach our full potential by improving our flawed natural bodies.
  • Changed ideoligion
  • Charge someone with a terrible wrongdoing and initiate a trial where they will be either convicted or exonerated. If the target is convicted, they can be freely imprisoned, executed or banished without penalty. The chance of conviction depends on the social abilities of the accuser and accused.
  • I administered a drug. It was a horrible offense against my beliefs.
  • I administered a hard drug - not medical or even social. It was a horrible offense against my beliefs.
  • I administered a recreational drug. It was a horrible offense against my beliefs.
  • I am free to explore the depths of my mind and the true reality without my sight limiting me.
  • I am happily connected to a Gauranlen tree.
  • I am on my way to enlightment through blindness.
  • I am on the verge of true enlightment through blindness.
  • I am surrounded by a lush forest.
  • I am surrounded by constructions that do not match the style(s) that reflect my {ADJECTIVE} beliefs. My beliefs are reflected by these styles: {STYLES}
  • I am surrounded by constructions which match the style(s) that reflect my {ADJECTIVE} beliefs. My beliefs are reflected by these styles: {STYLES}
  • I am surrounded by non-{ADJECTIVE} constructions. That's fine, but I'd prefer being in a more {ADJECTIVE} environment with constructions that match style(s) that reflect my {ADJECTIVE} beliefs. My beliefs are reflected by these styles: {STYLES}
  • I am surrounded by several massive, beautiful trees. The glory of nature astounds me!
  • I am trapped in a decaying prison of flesh! I need to get an age reversal in a biosculpter pod.
  • I am wielding a {WEAPON_label}. Such a detestable weapon!
  • I am wielding a {WEAPON_label}. Such a noble weapon!
  • I ate a meal that contained insect meat. I could still taste hints of bug-slime!
  • I ate a meal with a plant of the light. I wish it were a fungus.
  • I ate a meal with fungus. Is there any dish it doesn't complement?
  • I ate a meal without any meat. It was an abhorrent violation of the proper carnivore diet. Some eggs, milk, or processed food without vegetables would have also been okay.
  • I ate a meal without any meat. It was an horrible violation of the proper carnivore diet. Some eggs, milk, or processed food without vegetables would have also been okay.
  • I ate a meal without any meat. It was an unacceptable deviation from the proper carnivore diet. Some eggs, milk, or processed food without vegetables or would have also been okay.
  • I ate human meat! The world is right, and I am as I should be.
  • I ate human meat, as every real human should.
  • I ate human meat. It makes me feel noble and strong.
  • I ate some fungus and it was just what I like!
  • I ate some insect meat. So smooth and succulent.
  • I ate the flesh of a venerated animal. I've violated a most basic moral rule.
  • I bear a new ritual mark to bind me to our truth.
  • I bear a new ritual mark to connected me to our truth.
  • I bear a new ritual mark to remind me of our truth.
  • I bear the many cuts, as one ought to.
  • I bear the mark, as one ought to.
  • I butchered a human being. I believe such actions are wrong.
  • I butchered a human being. This is an offense against everything I believe.
  • I butchered a human being. This was a horrible thing.
  • I can explore a greater awareness through my inability to see.
  • I can feel the edge of its thoughts, see the endless scope when I close my eyes. I need to focus on my physical body or I drift away.
  • I can feel the edge of its wordless whispers... They make me uneasy.
  • I cannot stand this terrible light. My senses are overwhelmed!
  • I caused the death of a guilty prisoner. Let justice be served.
  • I committed a lustful act that was absolutely abhorrent.
  • I committed a lustful act that was deeply wrong.
  • I committed an act of desire, but it was the wrong thing to do.
  • I concealed my flesh. It was wrong.
  • I demonstrated my morality by accepting the discomfort of the slab bed.
  • I destroyed a natural wall. It was a horrible violation of nature.
  • I destroyed a natural wall. It's wrong to scar the world this way.
  • I destroyed a natural wall. What a terrible offense against nature.
  • I don't approve of covering myself, yet here I am doing it.
  • I don't have any artificial body enhancements. It's against my beliefs to be so unenhanced.
  • I don't like displaying my private parts or my chest.
  • I don't like having a {0} as a leader.
  • I enjoy wearing the faces of others.
  • I enjoy wearing the skin of others.
  • I enjoy wearing the suffering of others.
  • I enslaved a person. It's hard to justify such actions.
  • I executed a guilty prisoner. Justice has been served!
  • I executed a prisoner. Victory has consequences.
  • I feel good wearing human leather apparel.
  • I feel really uncomfortable with all this human leather apparel.
  • I felt at peace as the lanterns drifted off.
  • I forced someone into slavery. How can I justify that?
  • I had fun! We got to hang out and relax.
  • I had to cut down a tree. It was horrible to scar nature this way.
  • I had to cut down a tree. It was wrong to scar nature this way.
  • I had to eat a non-fungus plant food I despise. I much prefer fungus.
  • I had to eat food that wasn't taken from a human body. My beliefs strictly forbid such things.
  • I had to eat food that wasn't taken from a human body. This is absolutely against my beliefs.
  • I had to eat human meat. I believe such actions are wrong.
  • I had to eat human meat. This is an offense against everything I believe.
  • I had to eat human meat. This was a horrible thing.
  • I had to eat meat. It was a horrible violation of my beliefs.
  • I had to eat meat. It was an abhorrent violation of everything I believe.
  • I had to eat meat. It's not something I approve of.
  • I had to execute a prisoner. It's a horrible offense against my beliefs.
  • I had to execute an innocent prisoner. It's a horrible offense against my beliefs.
  • I had to harvest someone's organ. It's a horrible offense against my beliefs.
  • I had to harvest someone's organ. It's an abhorrent violation of everything I believe.
  • I had to install an artificial body enhancement. This was clearly against my beliefs.
  • I had to install an artificial body enhancement. This was deeply offensive to my beliefs.
  • I had to install an organ in someone. It's an abhorrent violation of everything I believe.
  • I had to kill an innocent animal. It was almost like being forced to murder.
  • I had to kill an innocent animal. It was not something I approve of.
  • I had to mine a hole. I disapprove of harming the earth this way.
  • I had to mine a hole. It was an offense against the earth.
  • I had to sell someone's organ. I don't approve of such transactions.
  • I had to slaughter an animal! It was horrible to snuff out a mind like that.
  • I had to slaughter and animal. It was an ugly thing to do.
  • I had to sleep in the same room as a slave.
  • I had to trade someone's organ. It's an abhorrent violation of everything I believe.
  • I hated having to make that skylantern, and they looked like garbage anyway.
  • I have a huge number of venerated animals around me!
  • I have a large number of venerated animals around me!
  • I have a moment's respite from the blinding sunlight.
  • I have an artificial body enhancement. I don't believe such things are acceptable.
  • I have an artificial body enhancement. It's an abhorrent offense against everything I believe!
  • I have claimed victory while wielding a noble weapon!
  • I have many venerated animals around me.
  • I have some venerated animals around me.
  • I haven't been around any trees in a while.
  • I just love this color.
  • I lack the appropriate ritual scar.
  • I look like a freak from a horror show, and I feel like I'm in a horror show.
  • I look like a freak, this is horrifying!
  • I look like a real cannibal. Who could doubt me?
  • I lost my role as {ROLE_labelDef}.
  • I made an accusation and couldn't even make it stick. This is humiliating.
  • I miss having trees around me.
  • I participated in a raid! Now they'll all know me!
  • I participated in a raid! That's how we do it!
  • I received counseling about something that's been bothering me.
  • I received counseling from someone. It felt nice to be listened to.
  • I received medical aid from one who carries the special healer status of my ideoligion.
  • I recently encountered a full tree.
  • I recently encountered a massive, beautiful tree.
  • I recently got to enjoy the company of a miniature tree.
  • I recently walked among a wide variety of trees.
  • I recently walked among many full trees.
  • I should be altering my consciousness. It's not right to be sober so long.
  • I should not be wearing human leather apparel.
  • I should really wear non-human leather apparel. I look like a crazy person.
  • I shouldn't have my private parts hanging out.
  • I slept with a sleep accelerator. It's helping me attain my true potential, as one should.
  • I sold a person into slavery. I hope nothing terrible happens to them.
  • I sold a person into slavery. I'm not sure I can forgive myself.
  • I sold someone into slavery. It'll make people notice my stature.
  • I sowed a human food plant. It was wrong - humans should eat animals, and animals should eat nature-made plants.
  • I think there may be a face on my clothes. Oh, no... my clothes *are* a face.
  • I took part in a ritual based on evil beliefs. Whether I liked it or not, I shouldn't not have done it.
  • I took part in a ritual based on false beliefs. Whether I liked it or not, I shouldn't not have done it.
  • I took part in a ritual based on other beliefs. Whether I liked it or not, it wasn't the best thing to do.
  • I took someone into slavery. With no choice, they had to submit to me.
  • I tried to convert someone and it didn't work out. Awkward.
  • I used a drug. Such chemicals in the body are a horrible offense against my beliefs.
  • I used a filthy weapon which ought never to be used. How humiliating.
  • I used a hard drug - not medical or even social. It was a horrible offense against my beliefs.
  • I used a recreational drug. It was an offense against my beliefs.
  • I very recently encountered a massive, beautiful tree - a physical seat of morality!
  • I want to wear apparel appropriate for my role as {ROLE_labelDef}
  • I was blinded in a righteous ceremony. Finally, I can start learning to see.
  • I was recently surrounded by a lush forest.
  • I was recently surrounded by plenty of miniature trees.
  • I was responsible for the death of a prisoner! Now they'll all respect me.
  • I was responsible for the death of a prisoner. Am I not a terrible person?
  • I was responsible for the death of a prisoner. I must be truly evil.
  • I was unjustly convicted of a terrible wrongdoing!
  • I wear the faces of my enemies. This makes me happy.
  • I wish to be blind so I can connect better with the true reality. Or, at a minimum, I should be blindfolded.
  • I wish to be blind so much. I need these physical sights gone so I can touch the true reality. At a minimum, I should wear a blindfold.
  • If it goes well, target's ideoligion certainty will be reduced or they will convert. If it goes badly, they will gain certainty in their old beliefs.
  • I'm a slave of a destitute group. I expect nothing.
  • I'm a slave of a group with meager holdings. I expect little.
  • I'm a slave of a poor group. I expect very little.
  • I'm a slave. I don't expect much.
  • I'm dressed in human skin. I do not like this.
  • I'm dressed like an insane person.
  • I'm getting old. I should get an age reversal in a biosculpter pod.
  • In the past quadrum, we didn't destroy many trees at all. Harmony with the trees is the basic foundation for a good life.
  • In the past quadrum, we have destroyed a horrific number of trees. We are the blight on this universe.
  • In the past quadrum, we have destroyed a lot of trees we shouldn't have. I don't think this was necessary.
  • In the past quadrum, we have destroyed a very large number of trees. I can hear the leafy screams even now.
  • In the past quadrum, we have destroyed an inexcusable number of trees. We need to do so much better.
  • In the past quadrum, we have destroyed an inexcusably large number of trees. The guilt lays heavy upon us.
  • In the past quadrum, we have destroyed many trees we shouldn't have. This crime was not necessary, but we did it anyways.
  • In the past quadrum, we have destroyed trees we shouldn't have. It might have been necessary, but it is still an occasion for sadness.
  • Increase someone's certainty in their own beliefs. The regained certainty is based on the speaker's negotiation ability.
  • Ingest drug
  • Ingest hard drug
  • Ingest recreational drug
  • Initiate a leader speech. If it goes well, listeners will gain improved mood, respect for the speaker, and possibly new inspirations. If it goes poorly, social damage will occur.
  • It has been a while since I've been near a tree.
  • It has been too long since I've been near a tree.
  • It has been too long since we executed a prisoner. Are we so weak as to take no life?
  • It has been way too long since I've been near a tree!
  • It is our duty to spread our beliefs.
  • It makes me perceive so much. Eyeless knowledge of absolute existence, all minds speaking and dying and birthing at once. It's hard not to lose connection with myself.
  • It pays no attention to me but I sense the edge of its perception. Flashes of terrifying timeless sight. Hard to ignore.
  • It's as though I've left the weak flesh behind.
  • It's been far too long since I consumed human. I should have eaten by now.
  • It's been far too long since we raided anyone. They might stop fearing and respecting us.
  • It's been too long since I consumed any human meat. It feels wrong.
  • It's essential to live surrounded by beautiful trees.
  • It's good to be raising animals here, though more would be even better.
  • It's good to be wearing {APPAREL} in accordance with my beliefs.
  • It's great to be wearing {APPAREL} in accordance with my beliefs.
  • It's great we're raising lots of animals here, though a few more wouldn't hurt.
  • It's important to be charitable to those in need. Refusing to help is a terrible act.
  • It's insulting to be ordered around by a {0}.
  • It's okay to harvest, buy, install, or sell organs.
  • It's shameful to be ordered around by a {0}!
  • It's wrong to be displaying myself like this. Only the face may be visible.
  • I've been around a few skullspikes recently. I like being reminded of our power.
  • I've been around quite a few skullspikes recently. All will fear us.
  • I've been around skulls on spikes. Just a few of them, but it's still disturbing.
  • Kill innocent animal
  • Killed innocent animal
  • Lustful act with non-spouse
  • Lustful act with spouse
  • Lustful act
  • Man is a stain on nature's perfection.
  • Man-flesh is morality. To eat a meal without it is unthinkable.
  • Many others here have different beliefs. I'm so proud to be part of such a community.
  • Many others here have different beliefs. It's a sign of a healthy community.
  • Many others here have different beliefs. It's an important sign of a healthy community.
  • Masterful! Old beliefs were left in tatters, and our true knowledge was accepted without a shadow of a doubt.
  • Men are the superior gender and should rule.
  • Men may have as many spouses as they like.
  • Men may have up to four spouses.
  • Men may have up to three spouses.
  • Men may have up to two spouses.
  • Men must be entirely nude at all times. Utility items like shields belts or jump packs are acceptable.
  • Men must cover their entire body and hair. The face may be covered, or not.
  • Men must cover their entire body, including their hair and face.
  • Men must cover their groin and chest. The rest of the body may be covered, or not.
  • Men must cover their groin. The rest of the body may be covered, or not.
  • Men should cover their groin, but may not cover anything else. Utility items like shields belts or jump packs are acceptable.
  • Men should keep a strong grip over their herds and their women. Raising animals for food is much better than farming plants. We don't tolerate arguments about any of this.\n\nUnlocks the animals specialist role.
  • Mining into the natural earth is an ugly act.
  • Mining is so important that we do it with great focus and respect, and we get more resources because of that.
  • Mining
  • Most couples share the woman's name.
  • Most of the armored shell of a warwalker. It appears to have been torn off by some colossal weapon system. All the valuable parts were looted, and the rest is badly deteriorated.
  • My apparel coloring is properly expressing my beliefs.
  • My body was despoiled by the use of a biosculpter pod.
  • My connection to my belief is increased by my third artificial enhancement. But I could use more.
  • My dedication is written in indelible pain.
  • My surroundings are not at all {ADJECTIVE}. I am happy to be a part of a diverse community.
  • My surroundings are not at all {ADJECTIVE}. I enjoy the diversity.
  • My surroundings are not at all {ADJECTIVE}. I'm very happy to be part of this diverse community.
  • My surroundings are very {ADJECTIVE}. That's fine, but a diverse environment would be better.
  • My tree... its calming presence became pure pain, then went silent. Its suffering echoes in my mind...
  • My tree's dryad is gone forever. You shall be missed, little one.
  • My truth is clear, yet almost all of those around me are so foolish they can't see it. I don't like being subjected to their idiocy.
  • My truth is clear, yet many of those around me are so foolish they can't see it. I don't like being subjected to their idiocy.
  • My truth is clear, yet some of those around me are so foolish they can't see it. I don't like being subjected to their idiocy.
  • My truth is so obvious, yet almost all of those around me are so deluded. It's horrible.
  • My truth is so obvious, yet many those around me are so deluded. It's horrible.
  • My truth is so obvious, yet some of those around me are so deluded. It's horrible.
  • My truth is so pure and obvious, yet almost all of those around me are captured by evil. It's abhorrent.
  • My truth is so pure and obvious, yet many of those around me are captured by evil. It's abhorrent.
  • My truth is so pure and obvious, yet some of those around me are captured by evil. It's abhorrent.
  • My youth is draining away. I should get an age reversal in a biosculpter pod.
  • No execution for {MINDAYSLASTEXECUTION} days
  • No human meat for {HUMANMEATREQUIREDINTERVAL} days
  • Normal lights are too bright. Darklights are better.
  • Now that my sight is gone, I can see clearly.
  • Offer counsel to a person to cancel the effect of a sad memory. The chance of success depends on the speaker's social skills and their relationship with the listener.
  • Offer guidance on construction techniques, boosting construction and crafting abilities for everyone nearby. The effect remains attached to the caster for 24 hours.
  • Offer guidance on farming techniques, boosting the farming abilities for everyone nearby. The effect remains attached to the caster for 24 hours.
  • Offer guidance on mining techniques, boosting the mining speed for everyone nearby. The effect remains attached to the caster for 24 hours.
  • Offer moral support that energizes the body, boosting someone's immunity gain for one day.
  • One of our prisoners died despite being harmless. We should be able to take care of our prisoners. If we wanted them dead, we could have at least conducted an orderly execution rather than permit that barbarism.
  • One of us butchered a human being. I believe such actions are wrong.
  • One of us butchered a human being. This is an offense against everything I believe.
  • One of us butchered a human being. This was a horrible thing.
  • One should always use a sleep accelerator. Slow-sleeping is just foolishly wasting your potential.
  • One who owns and trades slaves should be honored and respected.
  • Only the blind can be truly noble, for the sighted find their minds clouded by physical vision.
  • Only those who are blind can perceive the true reality.
  • Only two more artificial enhancements are required to fully synchronize with my beliefs.
  • Other beliefs are clearly folly. It's not good to let them exist in the community.
  • Other beliefs are evil deceptions ruining the world. It's totally unacceptable to let them exist in the community.
  • Other beliefs are immoral delusions which do real harm. It's bad to let them exist in the community.
  • Other beliefs are neither approved or disapproved.
  • Other beliefs are worth understanding. It's good to live with others who think differently.
  • Other beliefs hold unique knowledge. It's great to live with others who think differently.
  • Our beliefs are law and truth. We will try to convince them. Anyone who resists our teaching is a vile subhuman who must be crushed.\n\n Unlocks melee and shooting specialist roles. Will have gladiator duels.
  • Our blind have special ways of connecting with the psychic aether.
  • Our community is free from evil thoughts, as it should be.
  • Our community is free of filthy delusions, as it should be.
  • Our community is free of foolishness, as it should be.
  • Our people carry guilt from ages past. Others are more worthy.
  • Our people should dominate all others.
  • Our ranch is thriving. This is the right way to be.
  • Owning or trading human beings is a horrible thing.
  • Owning or trading human beings is deeply evil.
  • Pain
  • Poisoning the body for recreational purposes is a deeply immoral act.
  • Preach moral strength to a sick or wounded person through the concepts of your ideology. This will improve their rate of wound healing and immunity gain.
  • Prisoners must be executed on a regular basis. When they are, it is a happy occasion.
  • Provide suggestions and mental support, boosting the research speed of everyone nearby. The effect remains attached to the caster for 24 hours.
  • Putting skulls on spikes is a barbaric practice.
  • Raising animals is the right way; raising plants to eat is not.
  • Raping the natural earth with mining tools is a horrifically evil act.
  • Ravenous! It's been so long since I tasted the true flesh. This is wrong!
  • Research is a worthwhile form of work that the community needs.
  • Research is among the most meaningful acts a person can perform.
  • Research is an especially virtuous activity.
  • Research isn't a worthwhile activity at all. Why try hard at it?
  • Research work is unworthy of serious respect. Better not to be seen trying hard at it.
  • Research work just isn't particularly meaningful. Why try hard at it?
  • Responsible for innocent prisoner death
  • Responsible for prisoner death
  • Reverse {DURATION} of aging.
  • Review known ideoligions in the world.
  • Scarifying people for ideoligious reasons is horrible.
  • Skullspike encounter
  • Slaughter animal
  • Slaughtering animals is absolutely prohibited.
  • Slavery is a normal, unremarkable part of life.
  • Slavery is part of life, though it is extremely distasteful.
  • Slept in slab bed
  • Some others here have different beliefs. I'm so proud to be part of such a community.
  • Some others here have different beliefs. It's a sign of a healthy community.
  • Some others here have different beliefs. It's an important sign of a healthy community.
  • Somehow, that attempt at helping made things even worse.
  • Someone came looking for help, and we rejected them. What we did was inhuman.
  • Someone cut down a tree
  • Someone enslaved a prisoner
  • Someone executed a colonist
  • Someone executed a guest
  • Someone executed a prisoner
  • someone got blinded
  • someone got scarified
  • Someone harvested an organ
  • Someone installed an organ. The body should be sacrosanct!
  • Someone installed an organ
  • Someone is using the marksman command ability nearby, boosting this person's shooting abilities.
  • Someone killed an innocent animal
  • Someone mined a block
  • Someone mined a hole in the pure earth. It was a horrible violation of nature.
  • Someone mined a hole in the pure earth. It's wrong to scar the world this way.
  • Someone slaughtered an animal! A tragic loss of a unique life.
  • Someone slaughtered an animal! What a horrible thing, to snuff out a mind like that.
  • Someone slaughtered an animal. It's a sad thing.
  • Someone slaughtered an animal
  • Someone sold a slave
  • Someone sold an organ. It's horrible to trade human parts like machinery.
  • Someone sold an organ
  • Someone took body parts from our fellow. It's a horrible thing.
  • Someone traded an organ! What an abhorrent, disgusting act.
  • Someone traded an organ
  • Someone tried to convert me. I hate being proselytized this way.
  • Someone tried to convert me. I wish they'd just leave me alone.
  • Spectating slaves will be 100% suppressed. Depending on ritual quality, participants will get between {MINMOOD} and {MAXMOOD} mood for {MOODDAYS} days.
  • Spectators must be willing to watch the execution.
  • Spirits live in everything around us. In the plants and animals, rivers and trees, sky and stars. The moral structure of the universe springs from the necessity of respecting them.
  • Strong beliefs which support playstyles significantly different from classic RimWorld.
  • Suffering purifies and ennobles. Modifying the body to ease your life is the way of the filthy.\n\nUnlocks the medical specialist role. These people have reduced comfort expectations. Will have gladiator duels and sacrifices.
  • Such restrictive discomfort... Delightful.
  • Surrounded by the dead grin of spiked skulls, nobody could doubt our power!
  • Symbiotic moss that grows near Gauranlen trees.
  • Tame venerated animal died
  • Temporarily reshape the nervous system to deliver elevated levels of happiness for a time.
  • That blinding lacked passion and the technique wasn't great.
  • That blinding was botched and the mood was way off. What an awkward ceremony.
  • That blinding was satisfying. The cut was deep and made a satisfying wet-sucking noise.
  • That conversion ritual went well. The speech was stirring and enjoyable to listen to.
  • That dark-grown fungus food is just disgusting.
  • That duel was awkward. No aggressive energy, just attempts to survive.
  • That duel was good. The fighters really showed heart.
  • That duel was horrible. I'm still cringing thinking about the bumbling cowardice.
  • That execution was awkward. The incompetence on display made the whole thing feel unjustified.
  • That execution was electrifying! Never have I felt such a sensation of justice being served.
  • That execution was satisfying. It felt like justice was served.
  • That festival was awkward. I wish I could have left.
  • That festival was horrible. I'm still cringing from the awkwardness flashbacks.
  • That festival was something I'll never forget.
  • That funeral was borderline insulting to everyone involved.
  • That funeral was really uninspired and didn't resolve anything.
  • That funeral went perfectly - it brought up a lot of good memories and showed us a path forward.
  • That funeral went well - a good way to say goodbye.
  • That fungus smelled like damp rags and tasted no better.
  • That party was awesome! The music, the mood... Everything was perfect.
  • That party was not good. Uninteresting music, poor dancing. Wish I never went.
  • That party was terrible. Bad music, awkward dancing... ugh.
  • That sacrifice lacked passion and the technique wasn't great.
  • That sacrifice was botched and the mood was way off. What an awful, awkward death.
  • That sacrifice was satisfying - well-executed and appropriately bloody.
  • That scarification lacked passion and the technique wasn't great.
  • That scarification was satisfying - cleanly-traced and appropriately painful-looking.
  • That was a fun party. A good break from daily life.
  • That whole meal smelled like a dead rat left in a stagnant pool.
  • The {0} was a terrible! Everyone felt insulted for having had to endure it.
  • The {0} was awkward. The speech dragged on and when it came time to strike, the executioner slipped and barely recovered. None of it felt justified.
  • The {0} was beautiful. The drifting lanterns made everyone feel at peace.
  • The {0} was boring. Bad dancing and so-so music made the whole thing feel like a waste of time.
  • The {0} was boring. Everyone felt too awkward to open up and laugh.
  • The {0} was boring. The speech was repetitive and the blinding technique was noticeably flawed. It just didn't feel dignified.
  • The {0} was boring. The speech was repetitive and the killing technique was noticeably flawed. It just didn't feel dignified.
  • The {0} was boring. The speech was repetitive and the scarification technique was noticeably flawed. It just didn't feel dignified.
  • The {0} was effective. The speech not only delivered solid arguments and visibly swayed the convertee's thoughts, but kept the crowd entertained as well.
  • The {0} was fun. Everyone appreciated the chance to relax and have fun together.
  • The {0} was fun. Everyone enjoyed the break from everyday life and got in some good dancing together.
  • The {0} was good. Everyone appreciated the chance to relax and have fun together.
  • The {0} was good. The speaker's final words provided a path for everyone move on.
  • The {0} was heartwarming. The speech was captivating and heartfelt, and everyone came away focused on good memories.
  • The {0} was ineffective. Most of the arguments were unclear, and the convertee countered those that made sense.
  • The {0} was lackluster. The speech was long-winded and failed to resolve any emotions.
  • The {0} was masterful! Old beliefs seemed to dissolve effortlessly and inevitably, and our true knowledge was accepted.
  • The {0} was satisfying. Everyone could feel that justice was being upheld.
  • The {0} was satisfying. The speech felt meaningful, and the blinding technique was precise and dignified.
  • The {0} was satisfying. The speech felt meaningful, and the killing technique was precise and dignified.
  • The {0} was satisfying. The speech felt meaningful, and the scarification technique was precise and dignified.
  • The {0} was spectacular! One smooth strike was all it took, and everyone felt a rush of justice and power.
  • The {0} was spectacular! The speech brought everyone to the edge of a frenzy as the bladeholder artfully rended living flesh.
  • The {0} was spectacular! The speech brought everyone to the edge of a frenzy just as the blade came down perfectly, and the spurting blood was like cleansing waters for the spirit.
  • The {0} was spectacular! The speech brought everyone to the edge of a frenzy just as the eye came out with a satisfying wet noise.
  • The {0} was terrible! Awkward conversation, bad jokes, atrocious dancing, and dull music.
  • The {0} was terrible! From the first word, it was a fruitless back-and-forth argument. It dragged on for a cringe-inducingly long time.
  • The {0} was terrible! Participants endured hours of jaw-clenching small talk while waiting for it to end.
  • The {0} was terrible! People kept getting annoyed making the lanterns and they looked like garbage on the wind.
  • The {0} was terrible! The speech was stuttering and incoherent, and the killing technique was botched. The victim took far too long to die - everyone was waiting for it to end.
  • The {0} was terrible! The speech was stuttering and incoherent, and the scarification technique was botched. Everyone was waiting for it to end.
  • The {0} was terrible! The speech was stuttering and incoherent. The blinding technique was botched. Everyone was waiting for it to end.
  • The {0} was unforgettable! Everyone learned about each other and felt like a family.
  • The {0} was unforgettable! Making the lanterns was a time of laughter, and everyone's spirits rose with them.
  • The {0} was unforgettable! The dancers forgot themselves in the music, and the experience brought everyone together.
  • The {0} was unimpressive. Lantern-making took too long and it all felt rather pointless.
  • The after-effects of an incomplete biosculpting cycle. It causes nausea, dizziness, and fuzzy thinking.
  • The altar of a false belief is in the room with our {ALTAR_labelShort}! It's a disgusting violation of our sanctity.
  • The altar of a false belief is in the room with our {ALTAR_labelShort}. It's a violation of our sanctity.
  • The altar of a false belief is in the room with our {ALTAR_labelShort}. It's wrong.
  • The assault claw of an ancient mid-scale warwalker. This weapon specialized in tearing through heavy plasteel armor at close range. Its valuable components were looted long ago.
  • The blind stand pure above the sighted.
  • The blood! The release! That sacrifice made me feel like we were connecting with another world.
  • The body should absolutely not be poisoned by chemicals. The only exception is the use of medicine in direct medical care.
  • The broken shell of a mech drop beacon. Its useful components are missing and the shell has deteriorated after many years.
  • The caster fills themself with anger over ideological grievances. This strengthens the body past normal limits, but also means losing control and attacking every enemy nearby in an unstoppable rage. The berserk state will last for 3 hours.
  • The central core of an archonexus. Its broad surfaces are perfectly clean, and they somehow appear both flat and curved at the same time.\n\nTo most, its purpose seems unknowable. However, some say this is part of an archotech itself, and that the one who finds it can invoke the power of the machine god.\n\nThe psychic power it emanates is terrifyingly loud and complex, yet dead silent. It is heard without ears, felt without skin, seen without eyes, known without memory. It is the thoughts of a being from another plane of existence. The perceptions are reflected directly into any human mind who ventures too close, and few can hold onto their humanity for long under such mental pressure. Only the psychically-deaf are immune.
  • The community is a family of hard-working, like-minded people. Putting yourself first is not acceptable.
  • The connector will connect to the tree.
  • The courage... the blood... the death... I could never forget that.
  • The duel was boring. The fighters wouldn't commit, so there were no exciting moments.
  • The duel was good. The fighters went for blood and showed real heart.
  • The duel was terrible! The fighters bumbled around, ineptly avoiding each other in a extended display of cowardice and weakness. Watching it just made people sad.
  • The duel was unforgettable! Both fighters gave all they had, and the death showed their dedication.
  • The duration of the leader's work drive ability is tripled.
  • The faces on my clothes aren't smiling, but they make *me* happy.
  • The flesh curled and shapes like magic under the knife. It was a true transformation through suffering!
  • The flesh of man and woman is the highest form of sustenance. Also, it's just delicious.\n\nWill have gladiator duels, prisoner sacrifices, and human meat feasts.
  • The flesh! The flesh signals my triumph!
  • The god(s) do not have physical form, but are everywhere at once. They know all, and can do anything. Their will defines the moral structure of the universe.
  • The god(s) walk the planets like us, yet they are powerful and immortal as we are not. They decide the moral structure of the universe.
  • The human body must be enhanced with technology so we can build a better future for everyone.\n\nUnlocks the research specialist role.
  • The human body should not be debased.
  • The human race flourishes in the darkness of night and the underground.\n\nUnlocks mining and production specialist roles. Combat effeciency in the dark is increased.
  • The human race is at the peak of nature and must use technology to step beyond. We do this by enhancing our bodies with technology, but we like to hear others' view on the matter.\n\nUnlocks research and production specialist roles.
  • The human race is superior and the human body is sacred. We disdain body modification, scarification and drug use.\n\nUnlocks the medical and production specialist roles.
  • The intensity of terror this object induces when viewed.
  • The intensity of terror this person is experiencing.
