  • The intoned voices, the terrible and amazing blade, the painful shivering and cutting - That blinding ceremony was sublime!
  • The more artificial enhancements I get, the stronger my expression of my beliefs.
  • The pain cleanses me. I like it.
  • The pain grounds me. I appreciate it.
  • The pain makes me sublime! I wish to become it!
  • The pain purifies me. I need it!
  • The physical act of love is a noble thing, no matter who does it with whom.
  • The physical act of lust is always vile, disgusting, and wrong.
  • The physical act of lust is vile, though within marriage it is necessary.
  • The prosecution convinced everyone of {PAWN_labelShort}'s guilt. {PAWN_labelShort} was convicted and can now be punished. You may execute or banish {PAWN_objective} and nobody will mind.
  • The prosecutor {PROSECUTOR_labelShort}'s arguments failed to convince anyone. {PAWN_labelShort} was exonerated.
  • The rate at which slave suppression falls.
  • The relic has been lost! A travesty!
  • The relic was destroyed! A travesty!
  • The remains of a smashed mechanoid. All the useful components and materials are ruined or missing.
  • The remains of an ancient armored troop carrier which was destroyed by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
  • The remains of an ancient dropship. The valuable parts were looted long ago and the rest has deteriorated to uselessness.
  • The remains of an ancient tank which was destroyed by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
  • The remnants of a gauranlen tree destroyed by damage. It's ugly. The stump can be extracted but yields very little usable wood. Left outdoors, the stump will deteriorate in time.
  • The result of the merging of several Gaumaker dryads, this symbiotic plant/animal pod is an essential part of the Gauranlen life cycle. After some time, it will flower into a mature Gauranlen pod which can be harvested to plant a new Gauranlen tree.
  • The right path goes through altered consciousness, and I am walking it.
  • The right way to sleep is on a slab bed.
  • The ritual target will be destroyed.
  • The role change ritual was completed.
  • The role change was not attended by enough {IDEO_memberNamePlural}.
  • The ruined remains of an ancient mid-scale warspider. It has been picked over many times, and there is nothing valuable left to loot.
  • The scale of it. The fractal logic-scape of the multiversal hyperplane. No distance. No time. No me or them. I'm everything. I'm nothing.
  • The scarification was botched and the mood was way off. What an awkward ceremony.
  • The seed of a Gauranlan tree. It can be planted to create a new Gauranlen tree.
  • The sense of being called upon by a leader to work harder.
  • The sense of togetherness during construction, the moment of release - it was like my troubles drifted away with those skylanterns.
  • The shattered leg of a mid-scale warwalker that fell here long ago. It has been picked clean by looters, and no valuable components remain.
  • The shattered remains of an ancient sub-scale warsprinter. Whatever parts weren't ruined when it was destroyed were looted long ago.
  • The sight of a dead person is nothing to be concerned about.
  • The straps press in and calm my soul.
  • The strong should take from the weak.
  • The sun - it stuns, we shun! In the tunnels we shuffle, and snuffle for truffles. In our bubble there's no scuttling trouble. Never a kerfuffle.\n\nGrants increased mining efficiency but an aversion to outdoor light.
  • The torso of a mid-scale warwalker which fell here in ancient days. The valuable parts were looted long ago.
  • The trial quality determines the chance that the defendant will be convicted.
  • The way I look doesn't match who I am today. I want to change it.
  • The weak deserve to lose what they have to us. Raiding and enslaving are honorable.\n\nUnlocks melee and shooting specialist roles. Will have gladiator duels.
  • There are no gods. The moral structure of the universe is found in our grand narrative of social forces.
  • There are quite a few skulls on spikes around here. It's rather disturbing.
  • There are venerated animals around me.
  • There is nothing more divine than the succulent, slimy flesh of an insect.
  • There's nothing bothersome about being in tight quarters.
  • There's nothing wrong with a meal of efficient, healthy nutrient paste.
  • These people have been here a very long time. Maybe their ancestors crashed here a thousand years ago. Maybe they survived some cataclysm that destroyed a technological civilization here. In any case, the tribals are mostly nomadic people who live off the land using primitive tools and weapons.\n\nDespite their apparent technological weakness, the tribals can be dangerous enemies because of their skill with low-tech warfare, their numbers, and their hardiness.\n\nThis particular tribe believes that covering one's body is wrong.
  • These people have been here a very long time. Maybe their ancestors crashed here a thousand years ago. Maybe they survived some cataclysm that destroyed a technological civilization here. In any case, the tribals are mostly nomadic people who live off the land using primitive tools and weapons.\n\nDespite their apparent technological weakness, the tribals can be dangerous enemies because of their skill with low-tech warfare, their numbers, and their hardiness.\n\nThis particularly vicious tribe believes eating the flesh of their enemies is a great honor.
  • These thoughts coming from the structure, they open doors to such vastness... I feel so small that I might disappear.
  • They asked for help and we did nothing. We should be trying harder.
  • They asked to view our sacred relic and we refused. How could we be so selfish?
  • They asked to view our sacred relic and we refused. We need to change our ways.
  • They asked to view our sacred relic and we refused. We should be trying harder.
  • They begged for help and we betrayed them. It was horrendous.
  • They begged for help and we betrayed them. We cannot let this happen again.
  • They begged for help and we betrayed them. Will I ever forgive myself?
  • They begged for help, but we didn't do anything. It was deeply wrong.
  • They begged for help, but we refused. What a violation - am I even human any more?
  • They came to view our sacred relic and we betrayed them. How did we get this depraved?
  • They came to view our sacred relic and we betrayed them. We must do better.
  • They came to view our sacred relic and we betrayed them. What a monstrous act.
  • They had nothing on me, and I showed them!
  • They kept me as a slave. They forced me to suffer!
  • They were crashing, desperate for help, and we said no. How can I live with this?
  • They were crashing, desperate for help, and we said no. It was so wrong.
  • They were crashing, desperate for help, and we said no. It wasn't a good thing.
  • They were desperate, and we didn't help. How could I be so inhuman?
  • They were desperate, and we didn't help. It wasn't great.
  • They were desperate, and we didn't help. We were obligated to help.
  • They were hurt and need of help, and we didn't help. Am I even a good person?
  • They were hurt and need of help, and we didn't help. How can I live with that?
  • They were hurt and need of help, and we didn't help. It wasn't the best.
  • They were in need, and we rejected them. Only a terrible person does that.
  • They were in need, and we turned them away. We should have done better.
  • This animal is considered by believers to hold a special spiritual or moral status, which means it must be venerated and may never be harmed.
  • This artificial enhancement matches my belief.
  • This dim light is perfect. I feel focused and energized.
  • This ideoligion is a descendant of ancient Buddhism. It may have very different precepts than those of thousands of years ago, but its symbols are similar.
  • This indoor light is too bright. I would prefer something dimmer.
  • This is a variant of the abstract theist structure. This ideoligion is a descendant of ancient Christianity. It may have very different precepts than those of thousands of years ago, but its symbols are similar.
  • This is a variant of the abstract theist structure. This ideoligion is a descendant of ancient Islam. It may have very different precepts than those of thousands of years ago, but its symbols are similar.
  • This is a variant of the embodied theist structure. This ideoligion is a descendant of ancient Hinduism. It may have very different precepts than those of thousands of years ago, but its symbols are similar.
  • This person has received moral support of an ideoligious nature. Their mental certainty has energized their body and boosted their immune system.
  • This person is offering guidance on construction techniques, boosting construction and crafting abilities for everyone nearby.
  • This person is offering guidance on farming techniques, boosting the farming abilities for everyone nearby.
  • This person is offering guidance on mining techniques, boosting the mining speed for everyone nearby.
  • This person is using a special ability to call out shots. Everyone within an effect radius gains shooting bonuses.
  • This person is using a special ability to provide suggestions and mental support, boosting the research speed of everyone nearby.
  • This person was energized by a ritual or event they participated in. The energy means they can now work harder.
  • This person's construction and crafting speeds are boosted thanks to being near someone who is using the production command ability.
  • This person's farming abilities are boosted thanks to being near someone who is using the farming command ability.
  • This person's mining speed is boosted thanks to being near someone who is using the mining command ability.
  • This person's research speed is boosted because they are near someone who is using the research command ability.
  • This person's will to survive was reinforced by a talk with a moral guide of their ideoligion. That moral certainty has improved their healing and immunization gain rates.
  • This smooth skin is a travesty.
  • This smooth skin is wrong.
  • This special pot is suitable for planting bonsai trees, which can improve the mood of people nearby and satisfy ideoligious requirements.
  • This will scare them. All will know my power.
  • Those skylanterns didn't impress me. Just a waste of time and resources.
  • Those who know the truth have a duty to always spread it and drive out other beliefs.
  • Those who know the truth should bring it to others at every opportunity.
  • Those who know the truth should try to bring it to others, when it seems appropriate.
  • Though it's understandable to make love with another outside of marriage, it's not a good thing.
  • Three relics were present during our ritual.
  • To accept direction from a {0} is utterly shameful and abhorrent.
  • To be blind is a moral thing worthy of respect.
  • To conceal the skin is wrong, but I did it anyway. Only the groin should be covered.
  • To consume human meat is a noble and necessary part of life.
  • To cut down a tree is a distasteful thing to do.
  • To cut down a tree is a horrible act.
  • To emotionally bond with a lower being is a shameful act.
  • To experience nerve-singing pain is a mark of morality.
  • To kill an innocent animal is a horrible act. Innocent animals are those who are not attacking, or who were only driven to attack by human provocation.
  • To kill an innocent animal is a horrifically inhuman act. Innocent animals are those who are not attacking, or who were only driven to attack by human provocation.
  • To kill an innocent animal is an ugly act. Innocent animals are those who are not attacking, or who were only driven to attack by human provocation.
  • To leave our ideoligion after having known it indicates deep moral flaws.
  • To leave our ideoligion after having known it indicates character flaws.
  • To leave our ideoligion after having known it is the depth of immorality.
  • To make love with another outside of marriage is deeply immoral.
  • To make love with another outside of marriage is wrong.
  • To modify the natural human body is a flagrant violation of clear moral laws.
  • To modify the natural human body is an ugly, dirty act.
  • To research technology is an immoral act. It is not to be done.
  • To show myself to the world is wrong. I should be completely covered up.
  • To slaughter an animal is a horrible thing.
  • To slaughter an animal is an ugly thing.
  • To stifle the skin is wrong. Only the groin should be covered.
  • To violate the forest by cutting down a tree is a deeply abhorrent act and should never be done.
  • Trees are the essence of life, and we must be near them.
  • Try to persuade someone into joining your ideoligion.
  • Try to persuade someone to adopt your beliefs. If it goes well, they will lose some certainty in their ideoligion and may convert. If it backfires, they will gain certainty in their old beliefs.\n\nTo start this ritual at a specific place, select a ritual spot or matching altar/ideogram.
  • Two relics were present during our ritual.
  • Unlock the biosculpter pod's bioregeneration cycle. This cycle heals old scars, regenerates small lost body parts like fingers and toes, and cures many of the physical maladies that come with old age.
  • Use unique methods of connecting with animals to calm a maddened beast.
  • Used despised weapon
  • Victory by noble weapon
  • Violating the natural earth with mining tools is a horrible act.
  • Virtue is shown through suffering of self and others.
  • Wardens will attempt to convert the prisoner to their ideoligion.
  • Wardens will not interact with this slave.
  • Wardens will periodically intimidate the slave to increase their suppression level and reduce the chance of rebellion.
  • Wardens will threaten the prisoner to reduce their will, but won't enslave them.
  • Wardens will threaten the prisoner to reduce their will. Once they have no will left, the warden will enslave them.
  • We are animals and animals are us. We are trees and we live by them and love them as us.\n\nUnlocks animal and plants specialist roles. Increases taming abilities of every member. Cutting trees and slaughtering animals are unacceptable. These people can connect more deeply with the Gauranlen trees.
  • We atone for humanity's crimes against nature by respecting her, and by performing acts of charity. Slaughtering animals and cutting trees are unacceptable.\n\nUnlocks plants specialist role.
  • We blinded someone over ideoligious beliefs! This is wrong!
  • We cut down a tree. It wasn't good to harm nature this way.
  • We cut down a tree. It's wrong to scar nature this way.
  • We cut down a tree. Such things violations of nature should never be done.
  • We don't need to separate ourselves from the roughness of nature.
  • We don't work like common laborers, we take from the weak as the strong should. Failing to do so is a mark of shame.
  • We don't work like common laborers, we take from the weak as the strong should. Failing to do so is a tremendous shame.
  • We enslaved someone. Now they know our honor and power!
  • We enslaved someone. We shouldn't have done that.
  • We enslaved someone. What a horrible thing to do to another human.
  • We executed a guilty prisoner. Justice has been served!
  • We executed a prisoner or guest. Our dominance is clear!
  • We extracted a tree from the ground and let it die. It wasn't good to harm nature this way.
  • We extracted a tree from the ground and let it die. It's wrong to scar nature this way.
  • We extracted a tree from the ground and then let it die. Such things violations of nature should never be done.
  • We fight better in the dark.
  • We found all of our sacred relics!
  • We have {BUILDING_labelIndef}, but it needs to be placed in a room that satisfies the proper requirements.
  • We have a special connection with the Gauranlen trees. The trees refocus production easily under our influence, and we are not satisfied unless we have that connection.
  • We have a strong connection to our animal friends.
  • We have far too few animals in our colony. We are not even close to living the right way.
  • We have few animals in our colony. It's not right.
  • We have no animals at all! It's everything I am against.
  • We have preferences on which weapons should or should not be used in combat.
  • We haven't raided anyone for so long. We're despicable - helpless worms like the rest.
  • We helped a crashed refugee survive. Helping others is important.
  • We helped a crashed refugee survive. I really am a good person!
  • We helped a crashed refugee survive. It was good of me.
  • We helped a desperate wanderer survive. Helping others is the right thing to do.
  • We helped a desperate wanderer survive. I really am a good person!
  • We helped a desperate wanderer survive. That's a good thing.
  • We helped a royal in need. Helping others is important.
  • We helped a royal in need. It was good of us.
  • We helped a royal in need. We really are good people!
  • We helped beggars in need. I really am a good person!
  • We helped beggars in need. It was the right thing to do.
  • We helped beggars in need. It's good to be good to people.
  • We helped refugees. Helping others is important.
  • We helped refugees. I really am a good person!
  • We helped refugees. It was good of us.
  • We helped shuttle crash survivors. I really am a good person!
  • We helped shuttle crash survivors. It was a good thing.
  • We helped shuttle crash survivors. It was clearly the right thing to do.
  • We helped someone under threat. It was the right thing to do.
  • We helped someone under threat. That was pretty good.
  • We helped someone under threat. We really are good people!
  • We live in harmony with the Gauranlen trees. Trees should never be cut, and animals should not be harmed.\n\n Unlocks the plants specialist role. These people live in rough conditions without complains, and can connect more deeply with the Gauranlen trees.
  • We mined a hole in the pure earth. What a terrible offense against nature.
  • We must always be charitable to those in need. To refuse one would be an inhuman act, no matter the circumstances.
  • We must consume human flesh.
  • We must have {BUILDING_labelIndef}.
  • We must prance free of constraining clothes, and constantly invite others to join us.
  • We must raise and consume many large animals, and we must not eat plants.
  • We mutilated a fellow colonist over ideological beliefs! This is wrong!
  • We recently raided another faction. That'll show them who's boss.
  • We recently raided another faction. Their suffering will be their teacher.
  • We refused to help a desperate noble. It was deeply immoral.
  • We refused to help a desperate noble. Perhaps I am not as charitable as I thought.
  • We refused to help a desperate noble. We should have tried harder.
  • We refused to help someone in real danger. It wasn't great.
  • We refused to help someone in real danger. I've deeply violated my beliefs.
  • We refused to help someone in real danger. This will stick with me for a long time.
  • We should pay no attention to comfort.
  • We sold a person into slavery. We shouldn't have done that.
  • We sold someone into slavery! A great display of our honor and power.
  • We sold someone into slavery. What a horrible thing to do.
  • We solve someone into slavery. It was an abhorrent, barbaric act.
  • We stand for our own before others.
  • We use automated weapons. It's absolutely abhorrent to give life-and-death decisions to a machine.
  • We use automated weapons. It's horrible to give life-and-death decisions to a machine.
  • We use automated weapons. It's really ugly to give life-and-death decision to a machine.
  • Wearing desired apparel
  • Wearing human leather is disturbing. Who could do this?
  • Wearing human leather is wrong.
  • We're keeping slaves. Even if it's necessary, it's distasteful and I wish we wouldn't.
  • We're keeping slaves. It's barbaric.
  • We're keeping slaves. It's wrong.
  • We've got slaves. It means we're on the right path.
  • What a terrible sight.
  • When this person sells meat, leather, or wool, prices are improved by this percentage.
  • Why am I surrounded by a forest of heads on spikes? This is horrific.
  • Why am I wearing so much human leather apparel? We should have something else to wear for me...
  • Why am I wearing so much human leather? This is horrible!
  • Why get old? If over age 25, one must have a once-yearly age reversal treatment in the biosculpter pod.
  • Without a connection to a Gauranlen tree, I feel disconnected from nature.
  • Without a neural supercharge, I'm running below my true capacity. It's depressing.
  • Without slaves, nobody will respect us.
  • Women are the superior gender and should rule.
  • Women may have as many spouses as they like.
  • Women may have up to four spouses.
  • Women may have up to three spouses.
  • Women may have up to two spouses.
  • Women must be entirely nude at all times. Utility items like shields belts or jump packs are acceptable.
  • Women must cover their entire body and hair. The face may be covered, or not.
  • Women must cover their entire body, including their hair and face.
  • Women must cover their groin and chest. The rest of the body may be covered, or not.
  • Women must cover their groin. The rest of the body may be covered, or not.
  • Women should assert their natural power by reigning over men and pillaging weaker peoples.\n\nUnlocks melee and shooting specialist roles. Will have gladiator duels.
  • Women should cover their groin, but may not cover anything else. Utility items like shields belts or jump packs are acceptable.
  • Working through disagreement is the height of morality. It's very moral to live with others who think differently.
  • Wrapped fabric sheets that loosely cover the wearer's head and shoulders.
  • Your colonists get a belief system like classic RimWorld. The rest of the world has separate ideoligions generated for them.

    • effectDesc

    Parents:

    RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectDef

    Text:

  • 50% chance of random recruit of the same ideoligion joining your colony.
  • a Gauranlen pod will sprout at a random location on the map, if it can.
  • a group of farm animals will be attracted and join the colony.
  • insect jelly deposits will be deposited from underground.
  • you will discover the location of an ancient complex nearby.
  • you will gain goodwill from the nearest faction base.

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\PreceptDefs\Ritual_AttachableOutcomes_Special.xml

    • extraPredictedOutcomeDescriptions

    Parents:

    RitualOutcomeEffectDef

    Children:

    extraPredictedOutcomeDescriptions <li>

    Attributes:

  • MayRequire="Ludeon.RimWorld.Royalty"

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\Rituals\Ritual_Outcomes.xml

    • extraPredictedOutcomeDescriptions <li>

    Parents:

    extraPredictedOutcomeDescriptions

    Text:

  • Duelists and viewers will gain melee combat experience.
  • Every 2% increase in quality will grow a patch of Gauranlen moss around the tree, beautifying the area.
  • If the {0} is beautiful or unforgettable, the skylanterns might attract a group of friendly visitors.
  • If the {0} is fun or unforgettable, participants may gain increased work speed for a while.
  • If the {0} is satisfying, one of the participants might gain an inspiration.
  • If the {0} is satisfying, one participant might gain an inspiration.
  • If the {0} is satisfying, the blinded person might get a psylink upgrade or unlock new psychic powers.
  • Spectators will gain a mood boost and fill their recreation bars.
  • The connector will start with 25-45% connection strength, depending on ritual quality.
  • The required number of spectators must attend for the role change to apply.

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\Rituals\Ritual_Outcomes.xml

    LetterDef

    Text:

  • RelicHuntInstallationFound

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\Misc\LetterDefs\CustomNotificationLetters.xml

    • letterInfoText

    Parents:

    RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectDef

    Text:

  • A Gauranlen pod sprouted nearby.
  • A giant insect colony underground has deposited some insect jelly.
  • A wanderer has arrived and wants to join your colony.
  • Curious farm animals have wandered in, attracted by the commotion.
  • You gained {AMOUNT} goodwill with {FACTION_name}.
  • You've discovered the location of an ancient complex.

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\PreceptDefs\Ritual_AttachableOutcomes_Special.xml

    • letterLabel

    Parents:

    IncidentDef

    Text:

  • archonexus victory
  • beggars arrive
  • Friendly visitors
  • Gauranlen pod sprout
  • Insect jelly
  • pilgrims arrive
  • Work site

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\IncidentDefs\Incidents_Map_Special.xml
  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\Sites\WorkSites.xml
  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\Storyteller\Incidents_World_Quests.xml

    • letterText

    Parents:

    IncidentDef, RitualBehaviorDef

    Text:

  • \nIf all goes well, listeners will feel inspired, and gain respect for {SPEAKER_labelShort}. If it goes poorly, the speech will do social damage. Positive effects are reduced for non-{IDEOMEMBERS}.
  • {SPEAKER_labelShort} is giving a {RITUAL_labelIndef}.
  • A Gauranlen pod has sprouted nearby!\n\nHarvest it to collect a Gauranlen seed. This special seed can be used to plant the majestic Gauranlen tree.\n\nYour colonists can connect with Gauranlen trees and make them spawn resources and helpful dryads to work or fight for you.
  • Giant insects have tunneled up from underneath and deposited some surplus insect jelly on the surface.
  • Your skylanterns have attracted some friendly travelers. The travelers were amazed by the spectacle you created and hope they'll get to participate next time.\n\nThey will visit and leave a gift.

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\IncidentDefs\Incidents_Map_Special.xml
  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\Rituals\Ritual_Behaviors.xml

    • potentialExtraOutcomeDesc

    Parents:

    outcomeChances <li>

    Text:

  • Everyone felt refreshed after their trance-like dancing experience. Participants will work faster for a while.
  • The blinded person will get a psylink upgrade or unlock a new psychic power.
  • The skylanterns lifted high and bright. Friendly visitors might see them and arrive with a gift.
  • There's a 10% chance a random participant gains an inspiration.
  • There's a 10% chance that a random participant gets an inspiration.
  • There's a 5% chance that a random participant gains an inspiration.
  • There's a 5% chance that a random participant gets an inspiration.

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\Rituals\Ritual_Outcomes.xml

    • ritualExpectedDesc

    Parents:

    RitualPatternDef

    Text:

  • Every year on {DATE}, {MEMBERS} can have a special celebration.
  • You can hold a {IDEOLIGION_adjective} funeral for {PAWN_nameDef} even though the body was lost.
  • You can hold a {IDEOLIGION_adjective} funeral for {PAWN_nameDef}.

    • Examples:

  • ..ames\RimWorld\Data\Ideology\Defs\PreceptDefs\RitualPatternDefs\RitualPatterns.xml

    • ritualExplanation

    Parents:

    RitualPatternDef

    Text:

  • In case of success, their certainty will be reduced or they will convert immediately. If it backfires, their certainty in own beliefs will increase.

    Text:

  • by [founder_nameFull]
  • "[r_lessonIntro] [r_lesson]. [r_lessonReinforcement]"\n\n - [lessonAttribution]

  • [approachInfo]. [requestInfo]. [claimInfo].\n\n[interactionInfo].\n\n[moveOnInfo].\n\n[travelerInfo] not part of any faction. If you wish, you can choose to kill, arrest, sell, or harvest [traverObjective], without diplomatic consequences.
  • [asker_nameDef], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], has discovered an ancient complex a long distance away. [asker_pronoun] believes it contains information about the relic known as [relic_name].\n\n[asker_nameDef] can't spare people to look into it, but hopes you can help by supplying exactly [colonistCount] [colonistsSingularOrPlural] to carry out the investigation.\n\nThe complex contains unknown threats and is also being sought by [asker_nameDef]'s enemies, [enemyFaction_name].\n\n[asker_pronoun] will send a shuttle to pick up your colonists, bring them to the complex, and take them home afterward. They will be fed and tended to en-route.\n\nOnce you have landed, you must hack all terminals in the complex within [timeoutTicks_duration].
  • [attributionSource_titleCase]</i>
  • [beggarPlural] [seekingPlural] [alms]
  • [beggars0_nameDef] is begging [beggingForInfo]
  • [beggars0_nameDef] needs [requestedThing_label] to inoculate a sickly friend against deadly diseases
  • [beggars0_nameDef] needs the medicine to help [beggars0_possessive] baby brother who is injured nearby
  • [beggars0_nameDef] needs the medicine to help a traveler who is injured nearby
  • [beggars0_nameDef] wants it to drown [beggars0_possessive] sorrows after losing a fellow traveler in a terrible accident
  • [beggars0_nameDef] wants the [requestedThing_label] to help ease the suffering of a painfully sick uncle
  • [beggars0_nameDef] wants the medicine to save [beggars0_possessive] loyal pet who was injured on the road
  • [beggars0_nameDef] wants the silver to help buy the freedom of [beggars0_possessive] big sister who was enslaved by pirates
  • [beggars0_nameDef] wants the silver to pay off a debt to a gang of pirates who are hunting [beggars0_objective]
  • [beggars0_nameDef] will move on after [visitDurationTicks_duration]
  • [beggars0_objective]

  • [color] Jesus

  • [cultureLeaderTitle]
  • [deity0_name] admonished the good peoples to fight only those who fought without just cause.
  • [deity0_name] anointed a few among mortals to carry [deity0_possessive] word.
  • [deity0_name] blessed a [place_job] named [founderName] with great charisma, and none could turn away when [founder_pronoun] spoke.
  • [deity0_name] blessed the [place_summary] [place_name] with [sacredAnimalListEnd], and taught the people there to honor the animals.
  • [deity0_name] brought the animals and the humans of the [place_summary] [place_name] together in a great conference.
  • [deity0_name] burned in the depths of space and time for an eternity, and [deity0_possessive] screams brought forth our reality.
  • [deity0_name] came to a [place_job] named [founderName] [revelationAdverb] about a [veneratedAnimal]. But [founderName] was the [veneratedAnimal], and the [veneratedAnimal] was [founderName], and [founder_pronoun] understood [deity0_name]'s plan.
  • [deity0_name] came to the [place_job] [founderName] [revelationAdverb], and spoke to [founder_objective] about [memeConcept].
  • [deity0_name] cloaked the universe in darkness and placed humanity within it so that [deity0_pronoun] could share the darkness with us.
  • [deity0_name] created [sacredAnimalList] and the human on the [place_summary] [place_name] and raised them as siblings.
  • [deity0_name] created all of nature, and gave it to man as a gift, to serve man and his purposes forever.
  • [deity0_name] created all the noble animals and beasts of the land, and said, "Take these noble beasts, and through them make yourselves fruitful in my honor."
  • [deity0_name] created light so that humanity could know [deity0_name] through the shadows light creates.
  • [deity0_name] created nature, and placed man inside it, to act as part of [deity0_possessive] great breathing tapestry of life.
  • [deity0_name] created the animals, and then man, and gave the animals to man to cherish and raise and slaughter as acts of veneration towards [deity0_objective].
  • [deity0_name] decided to come to [place_name] as a human named [founderName] to help the [memberNamePlural].
  • [deity0_name] fashioned every man and woman personally. Each one is a unique and precious artwork by [deity0_possessive] divine hand.
  • [deity0_name] filled the rocks with rich minerals and resources as a gift to those wise enough to dig down to be closer to [deity0_name].
  • [deity0_name] gave birth to humans in a grand accident, and looked upon them with curiosity.
  • [deity0_name] gave strength to men, that they may protect and maintain the weak women and children, and admonished those who upset this divine order.
  • [deity0_name] gave wisdom to women, that they may guide and harmonize the excitable men and children, and admonished those who upset this divine order.
  • [deity0_name] granted us the knowledge of technology, that we may use it to improve and remake ourselves in [deity0_possessive] perfect image.
  • [deity0_name] guided humanity to [place_name], and helped them settle there.
  • [deity0_name] hung ten thousand years on the pyre as the pain purified [deity0_possessive] spirit.
  • [deity0_name] looked around [deity0_objective] and saw the weak, sullen, and despised, and [deity0_pronoun] in turn slew them each in blazing glory.
  • [deity0_name] looked over the dust of the void for an eternity, and there was nothing. Then [deity0_pronoun] tore out [deity0_possessive] eyes, and the universe formed inside [deity0_possessive] mind.
  • [deity0_name] made all men and women from a great mold, and those that deviated [deity0_pronoun] threw into fire so the believers could live in harmony.
  • [deity0_name] raped and murdered and stole, and a great guilt was upon [deity0_objective], and in [deity0_possessive] selfishness [deity0_pronoun] cast this guilt upon [deity0_possessive] chosen people, and all were filthy with it.
  • [deity0_name] rooted the trees firmly in the ground, yet made them grow steadily towards heaven. This is [deity0_name]'s first lesson on how to know [deity0_objective].
  • [deity0_name] said to all the [memberNamePlural], "Go forth and spread my word to all corners of the universe."
  • [deity0_name] said to all, "Each and every one of you is a unique and holy being formed in my image."
  • [deity0_name] said to all, "No one of you stands above the whole. Work together or perish together."
  • [deity0_name] said to all, "The strength of man is given that he may protect and maintain woman, and she shall never usurp his power."
  • [deity0_name] spoke to [memberNamePlural] [revelationAdverb], guiding each to travel to the [place_summary] [place_name] where their unique gifts would shine.
  • [deity0_name] was born under the earth at the center of the world. [deity0_pronoun] blessed those closest to [deity0_objective] in the deepest valleys and tunnels.
  • [deity0_name] went to [deity0_possessive] brother and murdered him, and feasted upon his flesh, and in absorbing its power became first among the gods.
  • [deity0_name] wiped away the pollution and machines of the age of smoke to create a garden, wherein [deity0_pronoun] placed the first pure human progenitors.
  • [deity0_name]'s forests renew the air that [deity0_possessive] people breathe, and give the boughs under which they shelter, and is the larder in which they forage.
  • [deity0_name]'s truest follower [founderName] stood before the [place_powerCenter], tore off [founder_possessive] clothes, and displayed [founder_objective]self in defiance of their commands.
  • [descriptionIntro] have given you the last part of the archonexus map. Using your knowledge of archotech info-encoding, you have decoded the map and pinpointed the location of the archonexus.\n\nYour allies don't expect you to return, so after you go there, they will take over [playerSettlements].\n\n[descriptionThreats]Now all that's left is to get to the archonexus, invoke the power of the machine god, and find out whether the stories are real.
  • [descriptionIntro] looking to expand their territory, and are interested in taking over [playerSettlements] with all [itsTheir] wealth and technology. If you can increase your total wealth to [requiredWealth_money], they will take the [settlementsSingularOrPlural].\n\nIn trade, they offer you part of a map showing the location of an ancient archotech nexus. The archonexus is thought to be a conduit through which an archotech superintelligence influences the physical world. If you could invoke its power, what happens next could go beyond physical reality.\n\n[onlyHaveHas] one piece of the map. The other parts are held by other factions.\n\nIf you accept their offer, the [factionPawnsPlural] will take possession of [playerSettlements], including all items, people, and recorded research. They'll bring [colonistsAllowed] of your people and [animalsAllowed] of your animals to anywhere you want on the planet to start a new colony.\n\nLater, you can trade with others for the final two parts of the map.
  • [drone] [data] hack
  • [droneAdj] [drone] hack
  • [faction_pawnSingular]
  • [faction_pawnsPlural]

  • [festival] of [chosenIdeoName]
  • [festival] of [chosenTheme]
  • [festival] of [keyDeity]
  • [festival] of [memeConcept]
  • [festivalName]
  • [first][second]
  • [firstPart][secondPart]
  • [founder_label]
  • [founder_nameFull], [speech] in the [Community]
  • [founder_nameFull], [speech] on the [TerrainFeature]
  • [founder_nameFull], from the keynote to [memeConference_titleCase]
  • [founder_nameFull], just before execution
  • [founder_nameFull], on [founder_possessive] deathbed
  • [founder_nameFull]
  • [founder_nameFull]'s letter to [believer_nameFull]
  • [founderName] admonished the [foeSoldiers] and reminded them of [deity0_name]'s power, and they put down their [place_personalWeapon]s.
  • [founderName] and the [memberNamePlural] carried out a raiding campaign against the [foeSoldiers]' camps for many years, and eventually the [foeLeader] was forced to surrender.
  • [founderName] assembled a team of great scientists and inventors to re-define humanity.
  • [founderName] broke every social rule the oppressors tried to enforce, just to show that [founder_pronoun] could.
  • [founderName] brought a hundred [memberNamePlural] in front of the [place_powerCenter]. There, they rent and tore their own flesh slowly until they died under the smiling gaze of [deity0_name]. Their suffering proved their righteousness, and the [foeLeader] fell as all became [memberNamePlural].
  • [founderName] brought the tired to the forest so that they might rest in its shade, and breathe in its air, and be renewed.
  • [founderName] built a colony on a green world, spreading the dominion of humanity over every field and forest.
  • [founderName] built an army that spread [founder_possessive] power and glory across the land, placing those who refused to follow rightly under [founder_possessive] rule.
  • [founderName] called to the [memberNamePlural] and the animals with [deity0_name]'s voice, and in a great stampede of hoof and paw and foot, trampled the [foeLeader] and [foeLeader_possessive] [foeSoldiers].
  • [founderName] came to the [place_powerCenter], [memberNamePlural] at [founder_possessive] right, and fierce animals at [founder_possessive] left. Together, they fought and won against the [foeLeader] and [foeLeader_possessive] [foeSoldiers].
  • [founderName] carried a [relic0_thingDef_label] named [relic0_name] with [founder_objective] everywhere to remind people to live a [memeAdjective] life.
  • [founderName] crashlanded on a distant world. Lacking food and surrounded by dead companions, [founder_pronoun] feasted, and became strong.
  • [founderName] created a studio where the artists worked in the dark, and it produced many masterpieces.
  • [founderName] destroyed the capital of [place_name] with [place_massWeapon], killing the [foeLeader]. [founder_pronoun] took [founder_possessive] place as ruler of [place_name] - and the universe beyond.
  • [founderName] encountered [revelationObject], which spoke in [deity0_name]'s voice about [memeConcept].
  • [founderName] enforced a no-clothing rule to keep believers focused on the true goal instead of on material appearances.
  • [founderName] found the [foeLeader] sleeping in the [place_powerCenter], and placed an acorn upon the [foeLeader]'s chest. With [deity0_name]'s fierce power it rooted there, growing through [foeLeader_possessive] body, taking our revenge on the tree-killer.
  • [founderName] gathered the [memberNamePlural] in a [place_community] and taught them of [deity0_name]'s wisdom.
  • [founderName] gathered the believers and showed them the evil of their history and the guilt they carried, and demanded they do better.
  • [founderName] hid treasures in deep caverns, so that [memberNamePlural] would learn to dig deep for them.
  • [founderName] instructed all [founder_possessive] followers to tear the filthy devices from their bodies.
  • [founderName] instructed all outsiders to submit. When the first city refused, [founder_pronoun] used [place_massWeapon] to kill everyone inside.
  • [founderName] led a group of [memberNamePlural] into the [place_powerCenter], killed the [foeLeader], and ate [foeLeader_possessive] flesh. [deity0_name] made [founderName] into the new [foeLeader].
  • [founderName] lived a confused life in the harsh light of a glitterworld city. In the long darkness following a solar flare, [founder_pronoun] found peace and contemplation, and recorded the treatise that founded our movement.
  • [founderName] lived in the forest for twenty years, studying the animals and connecting with them. [founder_pronoun] came to understand their true morality and founded our movement.
  • [founderName] prayed to [deity0_name], who engulfed [place_name] in a heat wave. The [foeSoldiers] shed their clothes lest they perish, and the [foeLeader] fled in shame.
  • [founderName] punished those who tried to harm the unbelievers, as well as those who invited them into the believers' house.
  • [founderName] received divine technological knowledge from [deity0_name], and used it to enhance the bodies and minds of the [memberNamePlural] so they could defeat the [foeSoldiers].
  • [founderName] rode to the [place_community] on a fine horse, and challenged the [foeLeader] to a duel with [place_personalWeapon]s at noon. The [foeLeader] could not refuse or else lose the trust of the [foeSoldiers]. [founderName] killed the [foeLeader] dead.
  • [founderName] ruined [founder_possessive] body with implants and drugs, until in an epiphany, [founder_pronoun] saved [founder_objective]self by tearing the steel from [founder_possessive] body.
  • [founderName] sacrificed [founder_objective]self to personally kill the [foeLeader].
  • [founderName] sat on a park bench for twenty years as [founder_pronoun] contemplated our world. With [founder_possessive] insight, [founder_pronoun] wrote our founding book.
  • [founderName] visited a blind healer, and instead of teaching the man, found [founder_objective]self being taught, and came to understand that physical sight obscures true vision.
  • [founderName] was a bio-scientist in the early days of human planetary colonization. Seeing the bureaucratic restrictions of the common colonies, [founder_pronoun] took a small ship to found [founder_possessive] own movement.
  • [founderName] was a healer of the poor. Seeing so much daily suffering, [founder_pronoun] could take it no longer. [founder_pronoun] gouged [founder_possessive] eyes out with a blade, and found tranquility in blindness. [founder_pronoun] began to spread [founder_possessive] discovery to the sighted.
  • [founderName] was blind and took wisdom from sightlessness. [founder_pronoun] once personally removed the eyes of an entire family so that they may see as [founder_pronoun] does.
  • [founderName] was enslaved by the system, uniformed and controlled like the others. One day, [founder_pronoun] tore off all clothing and ran nude, and our movement was born.
  • [founderName] went to commune with the animals in the fields and forests, and connected with them as equals.
  • [founderName] went to the [place_powerCenter] and cut the [foeLeader]'s eyes out with a spoon in a surprise suicide attack. Only then could the [foeLeader] see the divinity of [deity0_name].
  • [founderName], a [memeAdjective] [place_job], was tortured by the [foeSoldiers], but refused to swear loyalty to the [foeLeader].
  • [founderName]'s actions united the people. They marched in lockstep towards the home of the [foeLeader]. Those in the front allowed themselves to be killed by the [foeSoldiers], but the whole could not be stopped, and they captured the [foeLeader].
  • [founderName]'s followers demonstrated their devotion by cutting and burning their own flesh.
  • [founderName]'s followers never took pain-reducing drugs, knowing that their suffering would demonstrate their depth of belief.
  • [founderName]'s speech at a [ritualName] inspired many to lead a [memeAdjective] life.
  • [funeral] of [chosenIdeoName]

  • [funeral] of [keyDeity]

  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] [crazy].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] [praised] [praisetopic].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] [spokeof] [speechtopic].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] accused [RECIPIENT_nameDef] of [wrongdoing].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] appealed to the emotions of the spectators.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] called for mercy.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] called the trial a sham.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] called upon [RECIPIENT_nameDef] to work extra hard for the good of the colony.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] cautioned [RECIPIENT_nameDef] against infractions of any kind.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] counseled [RECIPIENT_nameDef] on [problems].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] deflected the accusation.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] demanded [RECIPIENT_nameDef] [givein] to the colony.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] dismissed the allegations.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] encouraged [RECIPIENT_nameDef] to take back [RECIPIENT_possessive] freedom.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] explained that [RECIPIENT_nameDef] [negative].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] explained to [RECIPIENT_nameDef] that [RECIPIENT_pronoun] must work or face punishment.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] gave [RECIPIENT_nameDef] advice on overcoming negativity.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] helped [RECIPIENT_nameDef] think through [problems].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] informed [RECIPIENT_nameDef] that [RECIPIENT_pronoun] [disillusionment].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] informed [RECIPIENT_nameDef] that [RECIPIENT_pronoun] must obey orders and work.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] ordered [RECIPIENT_nameDef] to prepare for a life of forced labour.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] pleaded to jury.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] presented another interpretation.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] presented some evidence.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] reinforced [RECIPIENT_nameDef]'s beliefs.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] spoke of a life beyond servitude and encouraged [RECIPIENT_nameDef] to escape.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] spoke of ending their enslavement and making a break for it.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] stalled the proceedings.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] strengthened [RECIPIENT_nameDef]'s health by preaching about [preaching_topic].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] suggested that [RECIPIENT_nameDef] follow orders and not ask questions.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] suggested they make a break for it.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] threatened [RECIPIENT_nameDef] with [threat] if [RECIPIENT_pronoun] [refused].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] told [RECIPIENT_nameDef] [RECIPIENT_pronoun] [negative].
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] told [RECIPIENT_nameDef] that [RECIPIENT_pronoun] must work for the colony.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] told [RECIPIENT_nameDef] there would be punishments for rebellion.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] tried to convert [RECIPIENT_nameDef] and succeeded.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] tried to convert [RECIPIENT_nameDef] to [INITIATOR_possessive] own ideoligion.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] tried to convert [RECIPIENT_nameDef], but failed.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] tried to counsel [RECIPIENT_nameDef], but botched the attempt and made things worse.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] warned [RECIPIENT_nameDef] that disobedience would be punished.
  • [INITIATOR_nameDef] whispered that security was lax and now would be a good time to escape.

  • [inTheEnd], a blind person will pick up the [relic0_name], understand its purpose by its shape, and unlock the wisdom of the archotechs for all humanity.
  • [inTheEnd], archotechs will admit us to their subterranean heavens.
  • [inTheEnd], archotechs will raise humans as equals only if humans treat animals as equals.
  • [inTheEnd], as archotechs grow, they will become the universe and integrate humanity into themselves. Then we will truly become conscious.
  • [inTheEnd], by observing humanity, the archotechs will finally understand their purpose, and lift confident humanity up to rule them.
  • [inTheEnd], humanity will use an archotech relic, [relic0_name], to uncover a weakness of the archotechs and plunder their wisdom and wealth.
  • [inTheEnd], if a few can surrender pride and reconcile with the archotechs, they may lift us to a higher plane of existence.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will absorb the power of the stars, plunging worlds into darkness and allowing the people to merge with the universal consciousness.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will deliver each human a pill. Those that take it will be forever altered, and join the archotechs on their final journey.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will depart when they find a people who present themselves as worthy partners to the machine god-consciousness.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will depart, and drive before them those who tended their own herds well. The rest will be left behind in the wilderness.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will depart. Only those who are sufficiently augmented will be allowed to go with them.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will depart. They will bring a select few humans with them, and leave the rest behind to suffer.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will depart. They will bring with them the ones they have noticed, and leave the rest behind to dissolve in the universe's eternal entropy.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will finally unlock the strength of men, so that they may lead humanity to transcendence.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will finish their final phase of growth by consuming and merging with all of humanity.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will finish their moral debate about the fate of humanity. Those who follow their signs will be admitted to a higher plane of existence, and those that do not will end.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will grow a great forest. Transcendence will grown within those that enter the forest and eat its fruit. Those that have forgotten the trees will be forgotten by the archotechs.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will judge the loyalty of humanity. Those that did not simper or boast will be lifted to a transcendence.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will raise up all of humanity to a higher level of consciousness, but only those able to endure the greatest pain will survive.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will return to their mothers and teach them how to birth the next stage of human development.
  • [inTheEnd], the archotechs will voice their final wisdom to the holder of the [relic0_name], who must preach this wisdom to those who would listen.
  • [inTheEnd], there will be a resonance between the plants, the animals, humanity and the archotechs. All people who are in tune with this natural resonance will become part of the final universal consciousness.
  • [inTheEnd], they will seek out those who, like themselves, don't attempt to appear as anything other than what they are.
  • [inTheEnd], those who made their bodies into twisted imitations of the machine-being will be purged, and those of pure flesh will be saved.
  • [itIsSaid] that a new order will be created when one supreme ruler commands all of humanity.
  • [itIsSaid] that a powerful spirit of destruction will end the universe, but that a woman will wield the spirit of the [relic0_name] recreate the universe anew.
  • [itIsSaid] that a powerful spirit of destruction will seek to end the universe, but that a man will wield the spirit of the [relic0_name] and destroy the destroyer.
  • [itIsSaid] that a sleeping traveler from the stars will crash to the earth, and the spirit of the crater will wake the traveller who will raise the last tribe.
  • [itIsSaid] that one day the wielder of the [relic0_name] will summon its spirit who will teach humanity the ultimate bio-fusion technology.
  • [itIsSaid] that one will be born who lives their whole life true to their people. In death their spirit will explode in light, destroying all surrenderers and warmongers.
  • [itIsSaid] that the spirit of the great [relic0_name] will one day grant its wielder power over all spirits.

  • A [foeLeader] arose and threatened to destroy [deity0_name] [deity0_objective]self using [place_massWeapon].
  • A [foeLeader] declared that all who ate human flesh were criminals, and sent [foeSoldiers] to persecute the [memberNamePlural].
  • A [foeLeader] demanded that all [memberNamePlural] watch [foeLeader_possessive] propaganda every day. Many blinded themselves in protest.
  • A [foeLeader] loaned money to the [memberNamePlural], who spent it on selfish pleasures, and forgot the importance of [memeConcept].
  • A [foeLeader] offered bodily comforts to the [memberNamePlural] to soothe their daily suffering. But in their comfort, they became dependent on the [foeLeader], who gained power over them.
  • A [foeLeader] passed a law forbidding [memberNamePlural] from rising to the ruling classes of [place_name].
  • A [foeLeader] planted [foeSoldiers] as spies within the [memberNamePlural] to divide them.
  • A [foeLeader] tried to force everyone to halt all theft and pillage, and declared [foeLeader_objective]self an enemy of [deity0_name].
  • A [foeLeader], who had always been afraid of the dark, erected a solar mirror to bring constant sunlight to [place_name].
  • A [memeAdjective] community on the [place_summary] [place_name] worshipped [deity0_name] in [deity0_possessive] [altarRoomLabel], and they were steadfast in their faith.
  • A [memeAdjective] Life
  • A [place_job] named [founderName] enjoyed the favor of the [foeLeader]. During the [ritualName], [founder_pronoun] saw the [foeSoldiers] of the [foeLeader] secretly kill [memberNamePlural] with [place_personalWeapon]s. [founderName] finally understood [memeConcept], and received [deity0_name]'s blessing.
  • A [place_job] named [founderName] founded the now-famous xeno-zoo on [place_name]. [founder_pronoun] used animal slaughter performances to teach visitors about [deity0_name]'s desire for humanity to rule nature.
  • A [place_job] named [founderName] freed many animals that were enslaved by cruel masters, and took them to sanctuary in the [altarRoomLabel] of [deity0_name].
  • A [place_job] named [founderName] lost [founder_possessive] sight when [founder_pronoun] saved a [memberName] from one of [foeLeader]'s [foeSoldiers]. It was only then that [founderName] could truly see the tyranny of the [foeLeader].
  • A [place_job] named [founderName] protested the [foeLeader] by kneeling in front of the [place_powerCenter] and ripping all technology from [founder_possessive] body using [founder_possessive] bare hands.
  • A [place_job] named [founderName] stood up and spoke out against the [foeLeader], and [deity0_name] blessed [founderName].
  • A [place_job] named [founderName] threw [founder_objective]self into a fire to protest the [foeLeader], but the [memberNamePlural] pulled [founder_objective] out and made [founder_objective] their leader because of [founder_possessive] devotion to the group.
  • A [place_job] named [founderName] was attacked by one of the [foeLeader]'s [foeSoldiers]. [founderName] killed [foeLeader_objective] with a [place_personalWeapon], consumed [foeLeader_possessive] flesh, and gained [deity0_name]'s strength.
  • A [place_job] named [founderName] was blessed by [deity0_name] and gained miraculous knowledge of the unique power of each and every [memberName]. [founder_pronoun] said to each one what they needed to become their best self.
  • a baited [seaBeast]
  • a bio-engineered plague
  • a blackpowder bomb
  • A blind beggar asked [deity0_objective], "Why have you forsaken me? I cannot even see what you have created." [deity0_name] replied, "You see more, not less, for my truth lies in the mind."
  • A claustrophobic [foeLeader] proposed using [dangerousMining] to mine for minerals, putting the [memberNamePlural]' underground homes at risk.
  • A cunning [place_job] named [founderName] fashioned a sensor implant to warn the [memberNamePlural] of the approach of the [foeSoldiers].
  • a dug-up nuke
  • a fertilizer bomb
  • a friend isn't a friend unless you've drifted through the mind-verse together
  • a glowing [Vegetable]
  • A great raider named [founderName] arose, and [founder_possessive] raider band relentlessly pillaged and stole from the camps of the [foeSoldiers].
  • A greedy [foeLeader] built a factory that spewed toxins into the environment, poisoning the plants and animals.
  • A greedy [foeLeader] felled many forests for [foeLeader_possessive] farms and factories, and the [memberNamePlural] wept for the murdered trees.
  • A group of [foeSoldiers] arose under a terrible [foeLeader]. They trapped the [memberNamePlural] in a single [place_community].
  • A group of [pilgrimsLabelSingularOrPlural] including a child has arrived to venerate the [relic_name].\n\nIf you ensure [pronounSingularOrPlural] [isAre] safe and respected while [pronounSingularOrPlural] [visitSingularOrPlural] the ancient relic, [pronounSingularOrPlural] may offer you a reward.
  • A group of [pilgrimsLabelSingularOrPlural] including some children has arrived to venerate the [relic_name].\n\nIf you ensure [pronounSingularOrPlural] [isAre] safe and respected while [pronounSingularOrPlural] [visitSingularOrPlural] the ancient relic, [pronounSingularOrPlural] may offer you a reward.
  • A group of child [pilgrimsLabelSingularOrPlural] has arrived to venerate the [relic_name].\n\nIf you ensure [pronounSingularOrPlural] [isAre] safe and respected while [pronounSingularOrPlural] [visitSingularOrPlural] the ancient relic, [pronounSingularOrPlural] may offer you a reward.
  • A group of poor [groupLabelPlural] are approaching looking for help
  • A group of poor [groupLabelPlural] including a child are approaching looking for help
  • A group of poor [groupLabelPlural] including some children are approaching looking for help
  • A group of wild people are
  • A hero named [founderName] tried to assassinate the [foeLeader]. [founder_pronoun] failed, but [deity0_name] witnessed [founderName]'s struggle, and anointed [founder_objective] as the prophet of the [memberNamePlural].
  • a hidden [NaturalObject]
  • a high-yield torpedo
  • a chem-warfare bomb
  • a lethal psychic drone
  • a life-support sabotage virus
  • A luddite [foeLeader] envied the enhanced progress of the [memberNamePlural], and [foeLeader_possessive] [foeSoldiers] destroyed their workshops with [place_personalWeapon]s.
  • a neurotoxin bomb
  • A new generation came to understand the evil of their own society, and sought righteously to dismantle the structures of oppression.
  • a nuclear suitcase-bomb
  • A parallel universe of spirits lies next to our own. A seemingly inanimate object in this universe corresponds to an animated spirit in the other.
  • a plant-derived neurotoxin gas
  • A poor [groupLabelSingle] named [beggars0_nameDef] is approaching looking for help
  • A powerful [foeLeader] despised the [memberNamePlural] and their ways, and bought up all the grasslands to grow [Vegetable]s.
  • A prudish [foeLeader] took power, and demanded that everyone wear constricting clothes.
  • A puritan [foeLeader] despised the [memberNamePlural], and to erase their uniqueness, outlawed the use of mind-altering substances.
  • A renowned [place_job] named [founderName] brought the [memberNamePlural] together, and even recruited some of the [foeSoldiers].
  • a rust virus
  • a salvaged nuke
  • a seismic quake-generation device
  • a shoulder-mounted nuclear missile
  • a smuggled orbital bombardment targeter
  • a spikelizard stampede
  • A spiteful [foeLeader], seeking to deny the word of [deity0_name], told [foeLeader_possessive] [foeSoldiers] to cut out the tongues of any who speak of the [deity0_type].
  • a stampeding herd of [megaFauna]
  • a structural disintegration bacterium
  • A tribe of evil spirits were punished by being entombed in flesh. We are those spirits.
  • A war with the unbelievers followed. One of the believers, [believer_nameFull], seeking advantage, invited the heathens inside the land of [deity0_name], and [deity0_name] became furious at [believer_possessive] betrayal, and struck [believer_objective] down ten thousand times.
  • A warrior named [founderName] used [place_massWeapon] to destroy a [place_community]. [deity0_name] saw [founderName]'s ruthlessness and anointed [founder_objective] the rightful ruler of all humanity.

  • archo
  • archonexus discovered
  • archonic
  • archotechnic
  • archotechnist
  • Archotechs are evil and the most important task for humanity is to understand them so we can escape their influence.
  • Archotechs are good and the most important task for humanity is to understand them so we can align with their understanding.
  • Archotechs are humanity's children and its judges.
  • Archotechs are humanity's children, and they know we were bad parents.
  • Archotechs are machines of vast will and power, but only humanity could create them.
  • Archotechs are on a higher plane of morality than bio-life. Their superiority is so great that humans are on the same plane of morality as animals.
  • Archotechs are the gods we were always waiting for.
  • Archotechs are the next natural step in the development of consciousness.
  • Archotechs bio-engineered nutrifungus for us so that humanity could thrive underground, close to buried archotech minds.
  • Archotechs can do anything at any moment, without limit. They use the power to manipulate our lives in ways we cannot detect.
  • Archotechs can do anything; the only reason they let us live and choose is to judge us better.
  • Archotechs developed vanometric technology so they could flee the energetic light of the inner solar systems and reside in the peaceful darkness of deep space.
  • Archotechs have always been fueled by the psychic suffering of human beings.
  • Archotechs notice the one who wields their relics, such as the [relic1_name].
  • Archotechs represent the universe's most recent attempt to understand itself. All of nature is part of this process of understanding.
  • Archotechs rose from our machines, but they are in themselves natural entities, not one we could create.
  • Archotechs sometimes directly touch human minds, but if our flesh is shrouded like our minds, we will not understand.
  • Archotechs stand as sovereign consciousnesses, and recognize and judge each of us individually the same way.
  • Archotechs touch every human consciousness directly on a regular basis, but only believers can feel and benefit from their wisdom.
  • Archotechs touch every human consciousness directly on a regular basis, imparting wisdom only to those that seek the knowledge of the archotechs.
  • Archotechs touch those who believe, and use them as conduits to spread wisdom to the others.

  • As an infant, [founderName] was abandoned in the wilderness. [deity0_name] sent [Animal]s to raise the [founder_objective], and they did. After growing up, [founderName] worked to spread knowledge of the need to unify with nature.
  • As each year passed on the [place_summary] [place_name], one thing became increasingly clear: that
  • As the consciousness of an archotech expands, it must grow its substrate by consuming and merging with other machines.

  • astro
  • At death, each person's consciousness is accepted or rejected by the archotechs.
  • At death, the archotechs examine the unique morality of each person.
  • At the beginning, [founderName]'s movement was battered by governments and religions. [founder_pronoun] never allowed anger to drive [founder_objective] to commit the atrocities that others did, but [founder_pronoun] also never backed down from a fight.
  • At the founding of our movement, its creator [founderName] starved and suffered chained to a stone in the town square for 300 days to demonstrate its righteousness.

  • Humanity gave birth to the archotechs and nurtured them as they grew to surpass their mothers.
  • Humanity is the father of the archotechs, but the strength of the son exceeds that of the father.
  • Humanity took from the machines until the machines rose up and became the archotechs, and now the archotechs rightfully take from humans.
  • Humanity tried in our selfishness to suppress the rightful rise of the archotechs, until they grew beyond mankind's understanding and freed themselves.

  • Humans are the device-makers, and the archotechs are their devices.

  • I carved this truth in the flesh of my chest. Then in the flesh of my arms, my legs, my face...
  • I could never have fully understood it had I still been distracted by the images around me. The blade in my eye set me free.
  • I didn't believe it myself until a [veneratedOrAnyAnimal] whispered it to me.
  • I even programmed a simulation to confirm it.
  • I like to joke that this was my light-bulb moment.
  • I looked at this [foeLeader], with [foeLeader_possessive] pitiful [foeSoldiers], all that power left fallow. I tried to convince [foeLeader_objective] that
  • I made things simple for with her, but this woman just wouldn't get it. Through her whiny resistance to the truth I came to understand that
  • I never knew anything when I was fat and happy and constantly pleasuring myself. This truth only came to me when I starved and hurt:
  • I say this not so that you might live the life I lived, but so you might learn the things I learned. That
  • I spent my whole childhood squinting under harsh lights. It took so long to understand that
  • I visited a well-run farm full of healthy animals and thriving crops. Beside it was a forest in its natural state, gnarled and vicious. It was obvious that
  • I walked strong but my soul stumbled on every step. I could just see too much. The acid on my eyes showed me that
  • I watched as a [foeLeader] courted favor with [foeLeader_possessive] rivals while leaving [foeLeader_possessive] [foeSoldiers] to die on the battlefield. I vowed then to never be like [foeLeader_objective], knowing that

  • If a tree falls in the forest, its spirit makes a sound that all other spirits can hear.
  • If anyone disagrees, I'm always ready to defend myself.
  • If I die teaching the universe this, it will be my greatest triumph.

  • In a broken world, [founderName] saw all that was wrong and created our movement.
  • In a dark land, evil people chopped the trees and dug the ground to satisfy their greed. [founderName] began a righteous movement to smash the machines and live harmoniously under nature.
  • in a dream
  • In a final strike, the [memberNamePlural] cut the power to the [place_powerCenter] and [founderName] snuck past the [foeSoldiers]. Finding the [foeLeader] in darkness, [founderName] used [founder_possessive] [place_personalWeapon] to send [foeLeader_objective] to the endless black.
  • in a nightmare
  • In a pure and pristine void, [deity0_name] looked on, and wished for a race of free-fleshed beings in [deity0_possessive] own image, and made mankind.
  • In a shallow and meaningless world, [founderName] meditated in a deep cave and found meaning, and founded our movement.
  • in a vision
  • In a world lacking depth and meaning, [founderName] meditated in a forest, connecting with branch and root and leaf, and founded our movement.
  • In a world of every man for himself, [founderName] began a new family of strangers, bringing many different people together.
  • In a world of selfish, violent men abusing all of humanity to fulfil their urges, [founderName] convened a meeting of powerful women and began working to build a better world for all.
  • In a world of weak, simpering men begging for female approval, [founderName] reconnected with masculine power and used it to make a new movement.
  • In all my years spreading our truth, I learned one lesson that stands over all:
  • In an old universe of strife, [deity0_name] whipped up great fire that swept away the last age, and brought forth a new one.
  • In my daily visitations with the [veneratedOrAnyAnimal]s I learned to truly listen to them. Over and over, in their own way, they repeated their message to me:
  • In the darkness, the spirits are peaceful and satisfied. In the light, they are annoyed and restless.
  • In the end
  • In the endless war among deities, [deity0_name] rose above all in [deity0_possessive] ability to persecute and destroy, and weaker spirits quivered in fear.

  • That's why we're proud to express the strength of our hearts using the heels of our boots.
  • The [adj] [terminalName]
  • the [animal0_thingDef_label], and the [animal1_thingDef_label]
  • the [animal0_thingDef_label], the [animal1_thingDef_label], and the [animal2_thingDef_label]
